programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Year of the Dog
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Mystery of Mona Lisa
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rusty Cuffs
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Make a Wish
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Tough Love
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Surprise Ending
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Big Wipe-Out
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: You Can Bet On It!
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Fly Boy
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Guns & Ice
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Smackdown of Baby Lyssa
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Your Lying Eyes
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit on this case takes them into some parts of Ohau, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Crime Don't Pay
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble - or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Twisted Love
programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Where the Wild Things Are
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado and they face a special challenge - getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive. Robin disposed of a body after a homicide, and now he's skipped his court date.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: No Luv Still
programme.desc: Dog is in search of a potentially dangerous fugitive, he's only 19 and charged with kidnapping and menacing. The case takes an unexpected turn when the Chapman clan ends up in a confrontation with the suspect's family.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Day of the Dog
programme.desc: Dog and the team are back in Colorado hunting bounties. Today's fugitive has a long rap sheet and a reputation for packing heat. With nothing but an address and phone number, the team heads out on the hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Time to Cry
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow Dog turns to the fugitive's on-again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Up on the Roof
programme.desc: Today, Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Let It Snow
programme.desc: Christopher is barely 21, already has a history of domestic abuse and assault, and is facing major time in a room without a view. This hunt won't be easy for Dog - the leads are few, informers and family are not forthcoming.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rush from Judgment
programme.desc: Facing hard time for forging checks, Melissa pulled a vanishing act at her sentencing hearing, bolting from the courthouse in broad daylight. Lucky for her bondsman, Dog and his posse are in Colorado and ready to help.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Burn & Return
programme.desc: Dog is busy. First, he's after a fugitive who is allegedly an expert in the game of "burn and return"- shoplifting goods to return them for cash refunds. But he's not easy to track.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Stormy Weather
programme.desc: Going after two fugitives in one day is tough enough without the facing Colorado's notoriously unpredictable weather. Today, it's the threat of severe thunderstorms, hail and area wide tornado warnings.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: One for the Money
programme.desc: It hurts Dog to see people who after years of walking the straight and narrow, suddenly lose their way. But today's case is a member of the law enforcement community who has recently gone astray, and that truly troubles the Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Reality Check
programme.desc: Dog is back in Denver and in hot pursuit of a woman wanted for identity theft. The sad reality is that the identify which has been robbed is her own. She's traded in a bright future for a life on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: No Piece of Cake
programme.desc: Being hunted by the Dog is a lousy way to celebrate your birthday but that's exactly the spot that Robert finds himself in today. He's missed his court date, quit his job, and vacated his last known address.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Prayers and Mace
programme.desc: Both brother Tim and fellow Honolulu bondsman James need Dog's help to track down their hard to find fugitives. The two cases on the docket today are challenging, especially the hunt for Gregory, a felon with a lengthy rap sheet.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: New Dog in Town
programme.desc: It's Beth's birthday and Dog knows just what she needs. He surprises Beth with Delilah, a puppy small enough to sit in the palm of her hand. Beth is so happy that she insists on taking the puppy with her on today's bounty.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and before Dog and Beth can help the kids carve their pumpkins, they have some business to attend to. It involves knocking on doors and meeting the neighbors but instead of hunting for treats they're on the search for a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Girl Trouble
programme.desc: Dog and the team have girl trouble in this case. Krystal jumped bail and seems to have vanished into the high plains of Colorado. To make matters worse, she's running with her lover (and bond co-signer) Carrie. But Thelma and Louise they ain't.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Boomerang Becca
programme.desc: When Rebecca returns home from her internship in Los Angeles, the Robertson family plans a big surprise party to welcome her back. Meanwhile, when Uncle Si gets sick, he seeks the help of Ms. Kay to take care of him.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Willie's Number Two
programme.desc: When Willie is looking to hire a new assistant, Korie insists he interviews her cousin, JD. Meanwhile, when Uncle Si spends the day over at Phil and Kay's, Jep stops by with the kids to keep them away from Jessica, who has taken ill.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Life of Si
programme.desc: After seeing footage Jep shot using a GoPro, Si decides he wants to use the camera to record a day in his life. But when Si gets on the guys nerves while they're hunting, they kick him and his GoPros out of the blind.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: From Duck 'til Dawn
programme.desc: When the duck guys have to pull an all-nighter to finish some work, Willie decides he wants to join them. But when a dying smoke detector distracts them from their work, Jase and Willie head off to disarm it.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Burger Commander
programme.desc: After visiting a popular burger restaurant, Willie and Jase get into a debate over which of them cooks the best burger, prompting them to challenge one another to a cooking contest.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: G.I. Si
programme.desc: When Willie and Jase argue over an old G.I. Joe toy, it leads them into a debate over who would make a better soldier. To settle the score, Willie and Jase head out to the woods with their friends and children for a paintball match.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Jase and the Argonauts
programme.desc: When Willie gets a soft serve machine for himself, he tells the guys they can't use it until they're done working. But when Jase thinks this is unfair, he takes matters into his own hands and finds a better object to use as motivation.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Fowl Playhouse
programme.desc: When Jase finds out Jep is planning to buy his kids a fancy playhouse from a catalogue, he and the guys decide to build one for Jep themselves. But the playhouse ends up looking more like a military-style duck blind.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Big LeCOWski
programme.desc: When Sadie spends the day at Duck Commander for a school project, the guys try to show her the ins-and-outs of how a successful company works. But when Willie questions Jase's ingenuity in creating new products they get into a debate.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertson family pulls together a family reunion to give Mia a big send-off before her surgery.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Governor's Travels
programme.desc: When the Governor of Louisiana announces that he will be coming to Duck Commander to present Willie with a commerce award, John Luke volunteers to give the introduction speech.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack and Gown
programme.desc: With Reed's graduation day approaching, Jase decides to take Reed frog hunting the night before, like he did on the day of his own graduation. Willie and Si join in, and Jase tries to keep them from imparting their "college advice" on Reed.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hands on a Woodchipper
programme.desc: When Willie agrees to sponsor Mountain Man's radio contest, a "Hands on a Hardbody" competition, he somehow finds himself competing against Si for Mountain Man's last minute prize: a woodchipper.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack Draft
programme.desc: When the Robertsons participate in the West Monroe Fire Department pancake breakfast, the firemen invite Willie and his brothers to train with the department for the day. Meanwhile, Phil and Si accompany Miss Kay on a trip to visit a family grave.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Brand of Brothers
programme.desc: When Willie contemplates re-branding the Duck Commander image, Jase takes issue with having an outsider design their image, so he and the guys create their own new logo and business cards. Meanwhile, Willie and Phil help Bella with her science project.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: De-Bug Life
programme.desc: The guys realize it is time for the annual cleaning of the duck blinds when they come across a gator using one as a home. Meanwhile, while the kids are running the church car wash, Si and Willie disagree on the best way to draw in customers.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Men vs. Wild
programme.desc: Brotherly competition is taken to a whole new level when Jase and Willie challenge Alan and Jep to a survival race through the woods on Phil's property. Meanwhile, Si is interested in finding a new hobby when he sees Kay cutting coupons.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Return of the Beavers
programme.desc: When Phil discovers more beaver activity on the Robertson land, he recruits Jase, Jep, and Si to get rid of them. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie bring Bella to her first day of karate practice.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Stumped on a way to celebrate Willie's birthday, Korie enlists the guys' help and Jase takes the reigns in planning a trip to the lake where Phil and Kay used to live. Meanwhile, the women realize a raccoon is inside the lake house.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Glory Is the Reward of Mallard
programme.desc: When Willie takes a business trip to Scotland to expand his duck call business, he brings the entire family along so they can reconnect with their Scottish roots. Willie organizes a bus tour to trace his family heritage.
programme.sub-title: Glory Is the Reward of Mallard

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Night and Good Duck
programme.desc: A special holiday episode of Duck Dynasty shows when the Robertson family took over the Thanksgiving special of a local TV show "Good Morning Arklamiss." Each family member presents a special holiday segment, with Willie and Jase serving as anchormen.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack in the Saddle
programme.desc: When Willie becomes the temporary owner of a thoroughbred, he and the guys take it to a local track and enter it into a race. Meanwhile, when Kay decides she wants to buy a new birdbath for her yard, she recruits Phil, Martin and Godwin.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: The Robertsons help a long time employee whose Mom has fallen on hard times by buying her a brand new house for Christmas. Jep, Jase, Martin and Godwin race to finish a deck in time for the big reveal, only to get sidetracked by a hammering competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Cannonball Runs
programme.desc: Jase enters an outhouse race to help promote Willie's Duck Diner, but when the Robertsons show up for the race, they face an unexpected rival - Phillip McMillan. Meanwhile, Willie attempts to create the world's greatest bologna sandwich.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Mo Math, Mo Problems
programme.desc: Willie helps Sadie with her homework by enlisting the guys to create a real-life version of a math problem, but when Jase and Willie get sidetracked helping Sadie, they rekindle an old argument of whether Jase can outrun a truck.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Coop! There It Is!
programme.desc: When Jep asks Willie and the guys to help move his old chicken coop into his new house, which is under renovation, Jessica takes issue with its appearance, leading the guys to yet another project - renovating the chicken coop.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Friday Afternoon Lights
programme.desc: When Willie becomes an assistant coach on Lil' Will's struggling football team, his authority is tested when the kids challenge the adults to a scrimmage. Meanwhile, Kay brings Jep and Si to an aquarobics class at a local health club.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Master and Duck Commander
programme.desc: When Jase and the guys transform an old pontoon boat into a floating duck blind, they are faced with the impending question of whether or not it will actually float. Meanwhile, Kay's dog Bobo misbehaves.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Inlawful Entry
programme.desc: When Missy's parents visit, her father convinces Jase to take him on a quail hunt. But while their "bonding hunt" yields very few quail, it does bring them closer together as friends. Meanwhile, Willie helps John Luke start his own snow cone business.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Flock and Key
programme.desc: Si recruits his nephews to help him transport a storage container to his backyard, but things take a turn when Jep becomes locked inside the box. Meanwhile, Jase helps Mia prepare for her cheerleading competition, but the only problem is he has no idea.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Ball in the Family
programme.desc: When Willie's old rival Phillip McMillan challenges him to a game of dodgeball, Willie recruits his family members to settle a score once and for all. Meanwhile, Si thinks his cat is cheating on him with another family, so he recruits Miss Kay.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drone Survivor
programme.desc: When Jase and Phil make a bet about whether or not human beings in a duck blind are visible from the air, Jep buys a drone copter to get a "bird's eye" view, but ends up losing it in the process.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Alan in Charge
programme.desc: Jase and the guys convince Willie to hire his older brother Alan to work at Duck Commander, but when Alan begins micromanaging everyone, they quickly change their mind. Meanwhile, the ladies take a self-defense class and use John Luke as a punching bag.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Renaissance Men
programme.desc: When the Robertsons throw a Renaissance Fair birthday party for Godwin, various family members compete in a tournament to win knighthood.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Heroes Welcome
programme.desc: In this special episode, the Duck Commander team surprises two wounded veterans with a trip to Monroe so they can be in an episode of Duck Dynasty. To show their support, the Robertson family stages a color run to bring awareness to our wounded soldiers.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Pie Hard
programme.desc: Willie and Alan agree to help Miss Kay open her own bakery, but things take a turn when Kay is asked to hand over her secret recipes. Meanwhile, the guys in the duck call room take an extended lunch break by driving to Mississippi.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Van He'llsing
programme.desc: When Missy and Jase's son Reed purchases an old van to boost his music career, his parents begin to question some of his choices. Meanwhile, Willie helps Jep prepare River for a competitive wrestling league by introducing him to his friend.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Veteran Dennis Dent faces a life-long nemesis. Christian takes on the wild back country.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Turbo struggles through a marathon trek to get back home.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Smuggler’s Cove
programme.desc: Border units are busy tracking down boats loaded with drugs and illegal aliens. In San Diego Bay a boat tries to blend in with the holiday crowd, but agents soon take notice of its extreme weight

programme.title: Drug Wars: The Walk to Freedom
programme.desc: Hundreds of migrants try to enter the US every day. Some are forced to work as drug mules, with many perishing during the harsh desert crossing.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Bricks in the Wall
programme.desc: Arrests spike along the border wall as residents of India and Pakistan leap over, right into the hands of the border patrol. Other teams investigate new smuggling tunnels

programme.title: Drug Wars: Joint Operations
programme.desc: For the first time, camera crews are allowed inside the Foreign Operations Branch Mission, a joint partnership between US authorities and Mexican Federales.

programme.title: Drug Wars: The Trap is Set
programme.desc: With dangerous threats identified and targeted, the Foreign Operations Branch and other units partner together to apprehend convicted felons and smugglers.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Stranded
programme.desc: The U.S Border Patrol received some solid intel about smugglers heading from Dominican Republic to Puerto Rico

programme.title: Drug Wars: Going Fishing
programme.desc: Dominican Republic has been combating narcotraffic for decades, but now an influx of traffickers with loads of cocaine has wrecked havoc on the island

programme.title: Drug Wars: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: After tracking down the Venezuelan Cartel boss in the Dominican Republic, local law enforcement prepares an operation to intercept his fast boat full of drugs heading towards the island

programme.title: Drug Wars: Take Down
programme.desc: Dominican authorities now have enough evidence to arrest the Cartel boss, but with his drugs having being seized, it looks like he will make a getaway to the airport

programme.title: Drug Wars: Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: Panama Law enforcement gets intel on a drug exchange between smugglers. Units head out to surprise the traffickers, but upon arrival, unexpected turn of events changes the mission

programme.title: Drug Wars: Ferry Dust
programme.desc: In Panama, Police units arrested two smugglers who claim local gangs stole their drugs. Now the search begins to hunt down the gangster responsible

programme.title: Drug Wars: Ping Panga
programme.desc: U.S Coast Guard gets intel from headquarters about a large shipment of drugs moving from Colombia to Panama, in small boats called “Pangas”.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Panama Or Bust
programme.desc: U.S and Panama forces collaborate in an effort to locate a possible smuggling vessel with a major shipment of cocaine.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Episode 1
programme.desc: Border Patrol agents in Ajo, Arizona spread out to patrol one of the most dangerous drug routes in the Southwestern United States. With cartel scouts watching their every move, a drug smuggling operation commences

programme.title: Drug Wars: Episode 2
programme.desc: Border Patrol’s elite tactical unit, BORTAC, seeks to capture a group of traffickers who are determined to move their drugs through the desert…under the cover of night. Agents wait until a loadup vehicle picks up the traffickers drug load to strike

programme.title: Drug Wars: Episode 3
programme.desc: Border Patrol Agents along the Rio Grande hunt down Mexican drug smugglers who are moving large stashes across the border. And Mexican Cartels branch into human trafficking, by exploiting a wave of migrants fleeing Central American violence.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Episode 4
programme.desc: Custom and Border Protection in Arizona itercept drugs even as cartels have become better than ever at hiding them in vehicles. In Rio Grande City, the hunt is on when a group of traffickers smuggles hundreds of pounds of drugs across the river

programme.title: Drug Wars: Episode 5
programme.desc: DEA agents in St Louis tackle a growing heroin epidemic, one dealer at a time. And St Louis law enforcement pulls out every stop to reverse the city’s culture of drugs

programme.title: Drug Wars: Episode 6
programme.desc: St Louis DEA expands its investigation into a suspected heroin dealer who has so far dodged them at every turn. And as a heroin epidemic hits America, young addicts in St Louis embark on the battle of their lives to break their addiction

programme.title: Drug Wars: Episode 7
programme.desc: “Five Dollar Insanity” hits South Florida, as law enforcement battles Flakka, a dangerous new synthetic drug that has invaded the streets.Cody, a St Louis heroin addict struggling to break his addiction, must summon the courage to travel to Florida

programme.title: Timber Kings: Frying Pan into the Fire
programme.desc: Bryan Jr. whips up an outdoor kitchen before hitting the beach in search of the ultimate driftwood bar.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Going for Gold
programme.desc: Joel takes on the mother of all builds – a 20,000-sq./ft. Pennsylvania mansion complete with walk through tree, hand-carved totem pole and 3-story spiral log staircase.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Take to the Trees
programme.desc: Peter may have met his match when he builds a mountainside ski cabin for a client experienced in log-home building.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Living the Dream
programme.desc: Beat builds a lottery winner’s 7,000-sq.ft. dream home in northern Alberta. Meanwhile, Peter must beg, borrow and steal to deliver on two high profile entryways for Canada’s Winter Games.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Night Sweats
programme.desc: Beat battles a stuck truck in the middle of the night, then builds in darkness to meet his deadline on a home in northern Ontario.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Log Building for Dummies
programme.desc: Joel pinch hits in Oregon, by building a home he’s never seen before using a crane he hopes he’ll never see again.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Weather or Not
programme.desc: Peter battles the elements to build a retirement home for childhood sweethearts, while Bryan Jr. constructs an entryway for his own sweetheart - wife Tabby.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: J.c. Bowl
programme.desc: A scholastic competition sparks a new love in Kim’s life and an old rivalry from Professor Oglevee’s past.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Whassup With Heyyy?
programme.desc: After T launches a successful business using one of Kim and Nikki’s favorite sayings, all three of them wind up in court.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Scary Kim
programme.desc: The Grim Reaper turns Kim’s birthday bash into the ultimate fright fest.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Election 2000
programme.desc: Nikki and Kim square off in a campus election.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: Money Is King
programme.desc: Hayden's mischievous ways pushes Fatima to a breaking point. (S4, ep14)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: We Know Enough
programme.desc: Danni makes things clear for Preston where they stand in their relationship. (S4, ep15)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: Look Closely
programme.desc: Sabrina realises that Bayo has a significant secret while Karen and Aaron draw closer. (S4,ep16)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: Some Sort of Woman
programme.desc: Calvin finds himself in an uncomfortable situation with Que after a night of drinking. (S4, ep17)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: Enemy Of Mine
programme.desc: Hayden is consumed with finding out how Zac keeps escaping jail time. (S4, ep18)

programme.title: The Game: I'm Not Kelly Pitts
programme.desc: Chardonnay must hide her friendship with Tasha from Jason while simultaneously dealing with the re-emergance of his football persona.

programme.title: The Game: I Love Luke...AHH!
programme.desc: Blue and Keira get into a conflict over what his role is when he breaks up a moment between her and her co-star. Meanwhile, Malik is devastated when he learns his past is preventing him from advancing in his future.

programme.title: The Game: Photo-Shoot Fresh
programme.desc: Can Chardonnay walk down the aisle without a hitch? Will Tasha find out who her baby's father is? Will Blue and Keira work out their problems (again)? All this and more on the season 7 finale.

programme.title: The Game: Psh!! I'm Good!!
programme.desc: Blue attempts to apologize to Keira and is spurned when he learns of a visit from a "co-worker." In an attempt to get over his frustration, he takes up Malik's offer to go out for a night on the town and join him.

programme.title: The Game: A Swan Song For Rick And Tasha...
programme.desc: After getting back together, Blue and Keira run into a slight problem when Blue starts to believe that their relationship is contributing to his poor performance.
programme.sub-title: A Swan Song For Rick And Tasha...

programme.title: The Game: Miss Me A Little When I'm Gone
programme.desc: Malik gets into a confrontation with his ex-girlfriend's current man, and must choose between her and his current flame. Meanwhile, Blue and Keira have a revealing moment after an argument about how honest their relationship is.
programme.sub-title: Miss Me A Little When I'm Gone

programme.title: The Game: In Treatment
programme.desc: Tasha seeks out counseling from a professional to determine where her datingproblems come from. Eventually Malik stops by, making it a group session with the mother and son duo discovering certain truths about themselves.

programme.title: The Game: Extra Butter...Extra Salt...
programme.desc: Keira and Blue attend the red carpet premiere of Baggers together, but their happiness is short lived when Keira advises Blue to step out during the sex scene. Tasha has an emotional moment with Jason before leaving to reconnect with her father.

programme.title: The Game: The Hospital Episode
programme.desc: Malik is rushed to the hospital after being brutally beaten by Franko. Keiraand Blue have a heart to heart while at the hospital. Jason and Chardonnay reconcile. Tasha has a very heated discussion with her father.

programme.title: Moesha: Break It Down
programme.desc: Frank takes Hakeem to the father/son “lock-in” at the local church, to encourage open communication and trust between fathers and sons.

programme.title: Moesha: Rhythm Dues
programme.desc: Mo encourages CPQ to submit their latest song to the local radio station for their “play it or stuff it” segment. When the song is played, it is well received. Q has written lyrics over a Morris Day song, and Morris shows up at “The Hole” where he plays.

programme.title: Moesha: The Double Date
programme.desc: Mo has been dating Bridgewood classmate Jeremy since her break up with Q.

programme.title: Moesha: He Ain’t Heavy – He’s Dee’s Brother
programme.desc: Mo gets a crush on Dee’s very attractive younger brother when he comes to visit.
programme.sub-title: He Ain’t Heavy – He’s Dee’s Brother

programme.title: Moesha: It’s My Paper And I’ll Cry If I Want To
programme.desc: Mo decides to publish her own Bridgewood newspaper when editor Mary Ellen refuses to add her to the staff of the existing paper.
programme.sub-title: It’s My Paper And I’ll Cry If I Want To

programme.title: Moesha: The “Short” Story
programme.desc: Mo’s group at the Den includes a short kid known as “Biggie”.

programme.title: Moesha: She’s Back
programme.desc: A famous female broadcast journalist who used to be friends with Frank speaks at Bridgewood, so Mo invites her to their house for dinner.

programme.title: Moesha: This Time You’ve Gone Too Far
programme.desc: Mo, Kim, Hakeem, Niecy, Morgan, Marco, and Chris head off on a road trip to San Diego.
programme.sub-title: This Time You’ve Gone Too Far

programme.title: Moesha: Body Language
programme.desc: Mo, Kim and Niecy play a game of “Truth or Dare”.

programme.title: Moesha: Model Employee
programme.desc: Rather than asking Frank every time she wants something, Mo decides to get a part-time job at the Class Act where Hakeem works.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Labor Of Love Episode
programme.desc: Dee Dee becomes hysterical when her mother goes into labor, while Mona remains calm; a motivational speaker (Evan Marriott) influences Charles.
programme.sub-title: The Big Labor Of Love Episode

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Good Help Is Hard To Fire Episode
programme.desc: Mona discovers that her new vice president title comes with new, sometimes unpleasant, responsibilities as she's forced to fire her friend and assistant Adam at the request of her boss Kai.
programme.sub-title: The Big Good Help Is Hard To Fire Episode

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Practice What You Preach
programme.desc: Using her womanly charm and baking skill, Phyllis competes with another female parishioner for the heart of the single and handsome Pastor Adams (guest star Clifton Davis), who is christening Big Dee Dee's new baby boy, Drew
programme.sub-title: The Big Practice What You Preach

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Employee Benefits Episode
programme.desc: When Dee Dee and her law school rival vie for the same internship at a prestigious firm, Dee Dee resorts to dressing provocatively to gain a competitive edge and impress her potential new boss.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Fetish What You Started Episode
programme.desc: When Dee Dee reluctantly rekindles a romance with her ex-boyfriend Clay (guest star Kiko Ellsworth), she wonders if he can appreciate her for more than her Jimmy Choos. Nu Soul Singer Musiq performs.
programme.sub-title: The Big Fetish What You Started Episode

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Mother Of A Mother's Day Rides Again Episode
programme.desc: When half-sisters Dee Dee and Mona compete over who can give the best Mother’s Day gift, the special day is overshadowed by their materialistic gestures
programme.sub-title: The Big Mother Of A Mother's Day Rides Again Episode

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Rules Of Engagement Episode
programme.desc: Despite going to great lengths to impress Nick's parents, Mona learns from Dee Dee that they don't approve of interracial relationships, but when she attempts to confront Nick about it, he stops her short with a marriage proposal
programme.sub-title: The Big Rules Of Engagement Episode

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lady Vampire
programme.desc: PRS investigates a case involving single mom, Dawn, and her 5-year-old daughter, both of whom are tormented by the appearance of a hag they call "lady vampire."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shape Shifter
programme.desc: PRS travels to Shapleigh, Maine where a woman and her daughter are reporting attacks from a winged creature with sharp teeth. Psychic Chip Coffey arrives and senses a half-human, half animal presence.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Boy Pushed Me
programme.desc: Bruce and Danielle are terrified by an EVP recorded in their Indiana home stating "Kill them." Even more chilling, their toddler son survived a fall out of a window only to tell his parents, "Boy pushed me."

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fury
programme.desc: Kathy, her two daughters and her new husband, "Farmer" thought they had the perfect, quiet life deep in the mountains of West Virginia.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Basement
programme.desc: A history of violence may connect the spiritual activity in Heidi's Ohio home to a long run of misery and cruelty.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Supernatural Seduction
programme.desc: PRS investigates the Campbell House, where the Innkeeper and guests claim to have sexual encounters with a spirit who has deep ties to a family tragedy.

programme.title: Paranormal State: I Am Six
programme.desc: Laura has felt oppressed by a violent spirit ever since she heard a chilling EVP in the fall of 2007. The 26-year-old claims she's been beaten, choked, even forcibly submerged.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Connection
programme.desc: P.R.S. is called in to help a young mother tormented by an otherworldly connection to a teenage girl murdered in her neighborhood years ago. Could she have psychic ability or is there a more sinister force at work?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghosts of the Forgotten
programme.desc: The PRS investigation into the haunted Lake County Poor House becomes a journey through one PRS team members? troubled past.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Man of the House
programme.desc: PRS is called to help a grandmother and her frightened grandson when renovations on her 19th century house stir up the pipe-smoking specter of a former tenant named Alfred.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shadow Caster
programme.desc: PRS investigates an Alabama home where clients, Georgiana and her two daughters, are so terrified, they moved out after only 18 months. They have seen shadow figures, been touched and have a recorded EVP stating, "Look at me, get out of here."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Satan's Soldier
programme.desc: Mark and Kim can't sleep through the racket caused by unseen forces in their central Indiana home. When PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger discover what appears to be blood in the basement, they investigate a history of violence in the home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Detour
programme.desc: With time off between cases, Ryan suggests to the PRS team they choose a random town to investigate. They roll into St. Helens, Oregon, home of Twilight, where they learn about the long history of the paranormal in the area.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact
programme.desc: Washington State, a hotbed of unexplained paranormal activity. Between possible UFOs in the sky and winged creatures in the woods, Ryan and his team are forced to face their fears and deal with the question: Are we truly alone in the universe?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Church of the Damned
programme.desc: Jason and his family can no longer do renovations of an abandoned Kansas church, especially after they found their father in the basement crying and frightened because of the menacing activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Spirits of the Slave Dungeon
programme.desc: Ryan books a two-night case in a real haunted jail in Charleston, SC, but PRS soon realizes the spirits themselves are being held there against their will and subjected to an unjust form of torture.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum
programme.desc: PRS explores a New York State Prison that was once a mental asylum. Ryan and his team go behind bars to uncover the institution's paranormal past and present.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Desperate Households
programme.desc: When Julie and her family moved into their dream home in suburban New Jersey they quickly realized they were not alone.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vendetta
programme.desc: P.R.S. investigates claims of supernatural revenge in the Pennsylvania Poconos. When a client's new boyfriend moves in, does the paranormal move in with him? Or did her ex put a hex on her house and the entire family?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lost Souls
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/medium Michelle Belanger investigate a Pennsylvania home; where a mother named Kathy and her son Michael have both felt the presence of a young boy and hear voices calling, "Mom?" but no one is there.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Hillary and her nine-year-old son Hunter are being harassed by a shadow presence in their Victorian home in Newburgh, Indiana. Trap doors in the basement reveal artifacts from a bygone era, and the clients have recorded persistent strange noises.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Woman in the Window
programme.desc: Ryan and his team lend paranormal assistance to a family who lives in a historic home that was once a part of the Underground Railroad. Does the answer to their haunting lie in the mysterious tunnels beneath the house?

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Knickerbocker
programme.desc: PRS checks into the Knickerbocker Hotel in Linesville, Pennsylvania where the owners are reporting strange noises and the appearance of phantom children in some of the rooms.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: When Paula's young autistic son Michael, with limited verbal skills uttered the words "Go away scary dead boy" -- it sent a chill up her spine.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Homecoming
programme.desc: Ryan brings PRS to his hometown of Sumter, SC to investigate a chilling case where a young boy was tragically shot and killed on a front doorstep while trick-or-treating on Halloween.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Smoke and Shadows
programme.desc: Sarah believes her Parkville, MD home has been invaded by a powerful force ever since her roommate Dennis moved in. PRS investigates claims that Dennis has been attacked by the entity, a possible poltergeist.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Permission To Do Harm
programme.desc: When a mirror levitates and shatters on its own, P.R.S. heeds the call to investigate a spirit that has been unleashed on an unsuspecting family. Ryan must track down the spirit and contain it before it does irreparable damage.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Sixth Sense
programme.desc: A worried mother calls the Paranormal Research Society to help her son Matthew, a boy who sees dead people. Matthew's story strikes a chord with team leader Ryan Buell who also experienced paranormal activity as a child.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Do Bad Things
programme.desc: After receiving a letter requesting PRS' help, Ryan and the team head to Ohio to help a grieving family and determine if the family's house contributed to the untimely death of a daughter.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room & Board
programme.desc: The owners of a vacation lodge in the remote town of North Hudson, NY, feel their woodsy getaway is plagued by negative spirits.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Mothman
programme.desc: Ryan takes his team to Point Pleasant, West Virginia to investigate his own personal holy grail of paranormal lore: the mysterious Mothman.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Firehouse
programme.desc: Everyone from the chief to the trainees at the Clementon Fire Department is convinced that the ghost of a former member is haunting their firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Man
programme.desc: A grieving mother suspects her deceased son may have fallen victim to a mysterious entity called The Dark Man.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room 37
programme.desc: Darrell and Cherry, the owners of an historic Tennessee bed and breakfast built in the late 1800s, are reporting apparitions of a man and hearing whistling throughout the hotel corridors.

programme.title: Most Haunted S24
programme.desc: As the team split up the fear become palpable. Without the safety of numbers the team are feeling they are being stalked and Glen comes face to face with some unexplained physical phenomena.

programme.title: Most Haunted S24
programme.desc: With the team on edge, they explore deeper into the darkness of this incredible place of mystery and secrets. Is the feeling of unease just in their minds or is something about to reveal itself.

programme.title: Most Haunted S24
programme.desc: The team are still spread thinly across this huge location and without the safety of numbers some of the investigators seem easy prey.

programme.title: Most Haunted S24
programme.desc: The last part sees the team reach their limits as the spirits of this enormous location continue to emerge from the shadows. But will the enormity of the paranormal activity prove too much for the world-famous team.

programme.title: Most Haunted S24
programme.desc: A haunted house, a haunted school and a haunted auction hall, all in one location, Bishton Hall. With stories of poltergeist activity, ghostly figures, strange voices and a dark entity, what will the Most Haunted team uncover tonight

programme.title: Most Haunted S24
programme.desc: With the night getting ever more active and poltergeist activity growing, something seems to target one of the team. And what activity could make Glen state ‘’that is paranormal’’.

programme.title: Most Haunted S24
programme.desc: Tired from this long investigation, the team continue where one of them realises that the idea to investigate along was a mistake, but can the others get there in time. And something has a final message for the team as they leave.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette leads her team to Belan Fort for its first paranormal investigation. Strange activity starts immediately, and one member is scared out of their wits.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: With so much to investigate the team continue inside the Fort and the spirits that are said to reside there keeps giving them the run-a-round.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The epic investigation into the hauntings of Belan Fort with entering the dock area and outer buildings. Where one of the team realises they are being followed.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team enter an old church in Leeds. The Priest’s Cottage not only boasts a great deal of paranormal activity itself, it also has haunted objects to add to the strange occurrences that have been witnessed with stark regularity.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team continue their investigation into this remarkable place and the spirits that are said to haunt keep team on their toes.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette takes the Most Haunted team to Wales to conduct a full investigation in the daylight, as most of the haunting occur before the darkness of night. An investigation that proved unrestful spirits do not just inhabit the night.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: We continue our daylight investigation into Plas Coch and the team look deeper into the strange happenings of this historic house.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Country Doctor
programme.desc: A country doctor refuses to slow down and seems to be working himself to death.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Time in a Bottle
programme.desc: A district attorney clashes with a lawyer who agrees to defend a friend charged with stealing.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Back to Oakland
programme.desc: Mark returns to Oakland to become a police officer again, and is reunited with his old partner. However, he discovers his old beat has become a storm of racial hatred.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: We Have Forever - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan hopes that he'll be released from his duties to be reunited with his former wife when she passes away.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: We Have Forever - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan hopes that he'll be released from his duties to be reunited with his former wife when she passes away.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Correspondent
programme.desc: A war correspondent finds himself imprisoned and facing execution. Meanwhile, Jonathan and Mark show him what's he's missed during his life by putting work ahead of family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Aloha
programme.desc: A Hawaiian singer learns to overcome self-pity after being disabled in a truck accident.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Dolphin Song for Lee - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help a teenage cancer patient named Lee who wants to save the dolphins.
programme.sub-title: A Dolphin Song for Lee - Part 1

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Lee's cancer is now in remission. She gets back to work on her save-the-dolphins campaign.
programme.sub-title: A Dolphin Song for Lee - Part 2

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Heaven Nose, Mister Smith
programme.desc: Jonathan must stop an angel who's back on Earth with the intention of breaking up his son's marriage.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Whole Nine Yards
programme.desc: A chauvinistic coach doesn't want a female wide receiver on his junior-high football team.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Whose Trash Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Mark's friend is running for public office, and he's a very honest man. But things get out of hand when an opponent tries to win by going after his son.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Hello and Farewell - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan helps Commander Michaels to deal with flashbacks of Vietnam; he also tries to convince her to go to therapy. Mark deals with his fear of flying.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Silent Bell
programme.desc: A pastor must follow a church council's decision to fire most of the staff at the school because they're not Christian.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Reunion
programme.desc: Mark attends his high school class reunion and learns that some memories are bittersweet for his old friends.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Source
programme.desc: A teenage girl tells school reporters that a driver came on to her right before the bus got into an accident. She may not be telling the truth. Jonathan tries to teach the news writers the correct way to report a story.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The problems of the handicapped are addressed when an amputee joins a crusade after a false fire alarm.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 1
programme.desc: Danny and Alice's project to re-habilitate a group of circus elephants has been a huge success but now they have too many elephants on Leopard's Den, so they urgently need to move the circus herd to the National Park.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: Leopard's Den is helping to build a new school in the township but when Danny hurts his back he begins to have a crisis about his age. Danny and Alice are surprised when Vanessa comes to them for advice.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3
programme.desc: Mara is hosting a beauty pageant and Rowan realises he needs all the publicity he can get. He buys a tiger from a zoo and convinces Alice he plans to rehabilitate it. Alice is enjoying working with her brother and even defends him to Danny.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: Danny and Alice have been preparing a cheetah for release in the wild but for some reason Danny's mind isn't on the job. He's been pre-occupied because he plans to buy a ring and propose to Alice!

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: Danny and Alice are taking a well deserved holiday but Olivia's upset to learn they're leaving that day. Angry at missing out on a driving lesson, she decides to take the jeep out on her own.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 6
programme.desc: Alice is enjoying her new job at Mara even though her animal census has revealed they have a lone male hyena that needs a pack. Du Plessis isn't happy about Alice working for next door.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: Danny's continued estrangement from Alice is really starting to take its toll. Over at Mara, Alice puts on a brave face as she meets Tom Cox, the owner of a rare male black leopard.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8
programme.desc: Caroline returns to find that all is not well at Leopard's Den. Danny has been putting a brave face on his ban but his attempts at helping out around the house are getting on everyone's nerves and Alice is finding his back-seat vetting especially hard.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 9
programme.desc: Danny is delighted to have his veterinary license back again and being back at work is helping to distract him from the impending anniversary of Sarah's death.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 10
programme.desc: Du Plessis is restless after his heart surgery but the family insist he needs to relax. Meanwhile Danny and Alice are happy to have closed down a zoo down that has been mistreating animals.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 1
programme.desc: While on honeymoon in London, Alice discovers that Danny has some final business to do before they can return home to Africa. He's reluctantly arranged to meet his estranged father, Robert, who has recently got back in touch.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: Danny is throwing himself into his work after the death of his father, and has applied for the role of State Vet. However, Danny's attempts to involve Thabo in the first phase of the Lion Breeding Project lead to Du Plessis feeling like an outsider.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3
programme.desc: It is Danny's first day as State Vet and when he helps rescue some smuggled animals he feels he's making a difference. However, he discovers the role isn't going to be all plain sailing.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: Danny's first big project as State Vet is a major animal translocation, and he is desperate to impress. Meanwhile, whilst Alice is out in the bush treating an injured zebra, she is stalked by lions. She makes it back to her jeep in time but is shaken up.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: Alice is still suffering from a loss of nerve after her close shave with the lions and so Danny tries to help her overcome her problems – the Leopard's Den lions have produced their first cub and he needs Alice back in the saddle.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 6
programme.desc: In his role as State Vet, Danny works with wealthy conservationist, Anton Ziegler, to catch a group of leopard hunters. Ziegler is also buying a tiger from Vanessa, who struggling with her finances, desperately needs the money to ensure Mara's future.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: Du Plessis has started a one man campaign of vandalism against the new neighbours at Mara; Peeters and the mining company. When Peeters catches him on CCTV, Du Plessis is fined and given a restraining order to keep him away from Mara.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8
programme.desc: Du Plessis comes to meet Caroline's plane but he doesn't seem happy – he has seen that the mining company have already started building the road which threatens Leopard's Den.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 9
programme.desc: The family are making arrangements to leave Leopard's Den, all except Du Plessis who is steadfastly refusing to accept that he has lost his home. He won't use his share of the money from the sale of the land to buy somewhere else.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Things Come in Threes
programme.desc: When two young mothers are gunned down behind a crowded bar, Kenda has to first determine who was the intended target and who was collateral damage.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Stuck In A Coffin
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a five-alarm fire, first responders discover a lifeless body. When Kenda learns that the deadly blaze was no accident, he launches a manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Metal on Metal
programme.desc: A athlete is gunned down just weeks before starting college, leaving family heartbroken and detectives stumped. The man seems an unlikely target, until Lt. Joe Kenda pries into his personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When a tip comes in suggesting foul play on a 71yr old man, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Mr. Violence
programme.desc: 29yr old Chris is shot in cold blood outside a neighborhood bar. Faced with a trio of suspects, Kenda trusts his gut and makes a controversial decision.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Fractured Glass
programme.desc: When affable ladies’ man Michael Tittemore is gunned down in the dead of night, Kenda first sets his sights on the roommates who were present during the murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Magic Bullet
programme.desc: A hard-working father of two is shot in the head just steps from a notorious strip club. The case is stuck in neutral until Kenda uncovers a conspiracy organized by an unlikely triggerman.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead Weight
programme.desc: A seemingly random attack leaves Mary Moebus dead, and police flummoxed by a daunting field of suspects. But when Lt Joe Kenda uncovers a cache of new evidence, he realizes someone’s been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Where is Claudia Jane
programme.desc: 15-year old CJ Bates is reported missing, and Kenda must investigate the mysterious circumstances behind disappearance of the teenager.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Rains Down
programme.desc: Restaurant worker Sharon Coleman is murdered in a hail of large caliber gunfire. Kenda must break through a web of lies to hunt down one of the most dangerous criminal masterminds he’s ever faced.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she’s been sold on the black market… or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Gut Instinct
programme.desc: When a soon-to-be grandmother doesn’t come home from work and the investigation unfolds, Lt. Joe Kenda realizes they could be dealing with a fledgling serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My First Case
programme.desc: In his first case with the homicide unit, rookie burglary detective Joe Kenda volunteers to work a bloody multi-victim shooting deemed “unsolvable” by the veterans.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Drive Thru Murder
programme.desc: Missy Berry is found dead in an idling car at a deserted intersection. A surprise twist in the investigation leads him into uncharted territory.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Pop Goes the Witness
programme.desc: The lifeless body of Willie McCarty is found at the base of a staircase. Neighbors direct Kenda to a truck spotted fleeing the scene, but a surprise visitor at CSPD turns the case on its head.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Invisible Knife
programme.desc: March must solve the mystery of how a man could be stabbed to death by an invisible knife, while attempting to summon The Devil during a black rite.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Strange Event at Roman Fall
programme.desc: A wife reports her husband, a reclusive mystery writer, has fallen off a cliff. Suspicion points to her as the killer and Colonel March investigates.

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre: Frankenstein's Castle of Freaks
programme.desc: When a Neanderthal man is lynched by villagers, Count Frankenstein (Rossano Brazzi) uses his years of research to bring the monster back to life. (1984)

programme.title: Bram Stoker's Van Helsing
programme.desc: England, 1897. Van Helsing receives a letter requesting his urgent assistance in the northern town of Whitby and follows the trail to the coffin of Count Dracula himself. A fresh take on the legend of Dracula through the eyes of his greatest enemy.

programme.title: Lady Frankenstein
programme.desc: When Dr. Frankenstein is killed by a monster he created, his daughter and his lab assistant Marshall continue his experiments. The two fall in love and attempt to transplant Marshall's brain into the muscular body of the retarded servant Stephen.

programme.title: York Witches Society
programme.desc: When an elite society unleashes an ancient evil upon the world, a young woman, the descendant of witches, must use her powers to save them all.

programme.title: Lady Frankenstein
programme.desc: When Dr. Frankenstein is killed by a monster he created, his daughter and his lab assistant Marshall continue his experiments. The two fall in love and attempt to transplant Marshall's brain into the muscular body of the retarded servant Stephen.

programme.title: The Monster Maker: The Monster Maker
programme.desc: A mad scientist injects his enemies with an acromegaly virus, causing them to become hideously deformed.

programme.title: The Vampire Bat
programme.desc: When corpses drained of blood begin to show up in an European village, town elders suspect a vampire on the loose.

programme.title: The Amazing Transparent Man
programme.desc: A crazed scientist invents an invisibility formula. He plans to use the formula to create an army of invisible zombies.

programme.title: Lost Creek
programme.desc: After moving to a new town, 11-year-old Peter and his friend Bill must team up with mysterious new girl Maggie and brave the woods on Halloween to face a monster born from their nightmares.

programme.title: House on Haunted Hill
programme.desc: A millionaire offers $10,000 to five people who agree to be locked in a large, spooky, rented house overnight with him and his wife.

programme.title: Castle of the Living Dead
programme.desc: A troupe of travelling players are invited by Count Drago to perform at his castle. Ignoring the warning given by a local mystic, they accept - and begin to die, horrifically, one by one!

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Life Saver
programme.desc: Bob inadvertently saves the life of a suicidal man who then decides to become Bob's best friend.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: I, Bob
programme.desc: When an efficiency expert comes to assess the Inner City Dental Clinic, Bob gets side shifted out of a job.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Mastermind
programme.desc: When Bob and Margaret have a fender-bender with a local mobster, they accidentally turn him into the police.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Outward Bound
programme.desc: Bob joins his male colleagues on a canoe trip to a provincial park.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Gary
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret thought they knew everything about their next door neighbours, until Joyce and Trevor introduce them to their grown son, Gary.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Very Fishy Christmas
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret experience a truly Canadian Christmas.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob's Burglary
programme.desc: While Bob and Margaret are sleeping, the local criminals, Beany and Boney clear their house - TV, video, microwave and electric toothbrush all go.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Blood, Sweat and Tears
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret decide they need to get fit.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Tale of Two Dentists
programme.desc: Bob's business is booming, and when Margaret chips a tooth Bob tells Margaret that he is unable to give her an appointment for sometime.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Night In
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret find themselves at loose ends one evening when, to their dismay, they find that there is absolutely nothing to watch on TV.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Shopping
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret, concerned at the amount they are spending in take away food and expensive local food shops, decide on an expedition to the Super Save Shopatropolis in Croydon.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Holiday
programme.desc: This charming, witty animated series focuses on the ordinary lives of a middle class dentist and his foot doctor wife. Together, they tackle traumas as being burgled, going on a holiday and deciding whether or not having a child will ruin their lives.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: For Peter's Sake
programme.desc: Bob's brother Peter is a successful chef who has a cooking show producing in India.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Friends for Dinner
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have been invited to Neil and Moira's for dinner, or so they think.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: Kevin is taken to court for writing what is considered to be a dangerous and threatening short story.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: Percy damages his newly reattached leg.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: Kevin's gonna do what Kevin's gonna do.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: Kevin wins an Old Barfy contest to have an all-girl punk band play in his backyard.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: The Spencers try to catch a big wrestling match.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: Percy's friend Luc gets out of prison, so everyone heads up north to help him flee parole.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: It's Kevin's birthday.
programme.sub-title: Two Strokes and You're Playing With It

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: Percy and Anastasia declare a war of the pranksters.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Arrivaderci, Odie/Gort Goes Good/Feeling Feline
programme.desc: Garfield becomes guilt ridden when he believes he has caused Jon to get rid of Odie./One of Orson's older brothers decides to turn honest./Jon thinks he's acting too much like Garfield.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Bear Facts/Nothing To Be Afraid/The Big Talker
programme.desc: Garfield runs into a bear and Binky./The crew try to find one item that Wade will not be afraid of./Garfield makes a local talk show host regret his anti-cat comments.
programme.sub-title: The Bear Facts/Nothing To Be Afraid/The Big Talker

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Cactus Makes Perfect/Hogules 2/Crime and Nourishment
programme.desc: Jon, Garfield and Odie visit Cactus Jake./When Roy and Wade have a fight, Orson wonders what Hogcules would do./Garfield discovers a secret world inside a tree.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: TV of Tomorrow/Little Red Riding Egg/The Well Fed Feline
programme.desc: Jon buys a new TV set when his old one breaks./Orson decides to make his own movie./Animal activist thinks Garfield is starving.
programme.sub-title: TV of Tomorrow/Little Red Riding Egg/The Well Fed Feline

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Invasion of the Big Robots/Shelf-Esteem/Housebreak Hotel
programme.desc: Garfield wakes up to discover he's in the wrong cartoon./Orson can't pick up a book without reading it./Garfield and Odie stay in a ritzy pet hotel.
programme.sub-title: Invasion of the Big Robots/Shelf-Esteem/Housebreak Hotel

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: First Class Feline/Hamelot/How to be funny
programme.desc: Garfield's plan to send Nermal to Abu Dhabi fails./Orson dreams about the knights of the round table./Garfield lectures on what humor is.
programme.sub-title: First Class Feline/Hamelot/How to be funny

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Mystic Manor/Flop Goes the Weasel/The Legend of Long Jon
programme.desc: Garfield discovers a famous "haunted house" attraction is closed./Wade inadvertently defeats a local weasel./Jon discovers he is related to a traitor of George Washington.
programme.sub-title: Mystic Manor/Flop Goes the Weasel/The Legend of Long Jon

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: China Cat/Cock-A-Doodle Dandy/Beach Blanket Bonzo
programme.desc: Jon and Garfield hear the story of the dragon and the cat./Roy's Morning bugle keeps waking up an angry bear./Garfield's attempt at a beach romance are hindered.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Lemon Aid/Hog Noon/Video Airlines
programme.desc: Jon wins a free car./A school mate is coming back to settle an old score./Jon decides to go to a video store.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Mail Animal/Peanut-Brained Rooster/Mummy Dearest
programme.desc: Garfield gets their mailman fired./Roy can't get enough of the latest crop of peanuts./Garfield dreams he's in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Skyway Robbery/The Bunny Rabbits Coming/Close Encounters of the Garfield Kind
programme.desc: Jon decides to fly Swindler Airlines to Miami./A mysterious message arrives./A friendly alien lands in Jon's backyard.
programme.sub-title: Skyway Robbery/The Bunny Rabbits Coming/Close Encounters of the Garfield Kind

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Astrocat/Cock a Doodle Duel/Cinderella Cat
programme.desc: Garfield's relative was the first cat to land on the moon./A rooster arrives from another farm./Garfield's fairy Godfather makes him an offer.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Ship Shape/Barn of Fear 2/Break a Leg
programme.desc: Jon goes on a cruise./The ancestors of the U.S. Acres assist in foil-ing Orson's greedy brothers./Garfield and Odie tag along as Jon heads to a ski lodge.
programme.sub-title: Ship Shape/Barn of Fear 2/Break a Leg

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Twice Told Tale/Orson Goes on Vacation/Wedding Bell Blues
programme.desc: Jon and Garfield's house gets filled with yogurt./Orson goes away and leaves Wade in charge./Garfield thinks Jon is getting married and tries to stop a wedding ceremony.
programme.sub-title: Twice Told Tale/Orson Goes on Vacation/Wedding Bell Blues

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Clean Sweep/Secrets of the Animated Cartoon/How the West was Lost
programme.desc: Jon gets an automatic dog washer./Orson gives a lecture on cartoon rules and logic./Garfield comes to the rescue when Cactus Jake is fired.
programme.sub-title: Clean Sweep/Secrets of the Animated Cartoon/How the West was Lost
