programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Abduction
programme.desc: A volunteer who was working to interpret an ancient message from Ma'el assaults Da'an and escapes through a portal. Sandoval helps Da'an avoid interrogation from Zo'or while they try to locate her.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Arrival
programme.desc: A Taelon shuttle is shot down over Antarctica. There are Jiridians aboard, but two of the passengers escape. When Augur discovers Lili's blood on the ship, he is convinced that she is not dead.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Forge of Creation
programme.desc: Lili, Vorjak, and the baby flee to find a shuttle to escape Earth. Liam and Sandoval are both tracking them - for different reasons. Augur is on the run from volunteers, but sends a friend (Juliet) to help Liam while he's gone.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: First Breath
programme.desc: A college friend of Renee's resurfaces and leads them on an investigation of the link between the Taelons and a biomedical facility's cloning operation.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Sins of the Father
programme.desc: A Senator's daughter is found to have kryss in her system. Liam and Renee suspect the Taelons lied about synthesizing it and there is a new location for production. They believe Federov is involved. Da'an is addicted to kryss.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Limbo
programme.desc: The Taelons lend some of their dwindling core energy to Joshua Doors for a pilot cold fusion project, but the energy is stolen, leaving the Taelons vulnerable. Jonathan Doors lives on as an AI in cyberspace.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Motherlode
programme.desc: Augur is caught and placed in a special prison where he is placed in a sensory deprivation chamber. An amoralist gets him out and wants Augur to help him steal the gold Zo'or has on the mothership. When Liam learns of what happened he tries to find Augur.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Take No Prisoners
programme.desc: The ANA negotiate amnesty for all resistance members, Liam tries to convince resistance member Halley Simmons to take the offer. Sandoval uses parasites to make volunteers do suicide missions against the resistance.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Second Wave
programme.desc: The Taelons decide to leave Earth when it appears that the Jiridians are invading. Meanwhile, a group of Resistance prisoners saved from the mother ship include several disguised Jiridians who are causing trouble for Liam and Renee.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Essence
programme.desc: Renee's brother has PTSD. In a desperate effort to help him, she agrees to let him undergo special treatment. The treatment removes his emotion. The project is overseen by Sandoval and the emotion they take is given to Da'an.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Phantom Companion
programme.desc: While on board the mothership, Renee sustains an injury and while being treated, she gets pulled into the walls and disappears.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Dream Stalker
programme.desc: Street asks Liam to help a friend who's arrested for the murder of a man he hated. Liam talks to him and he claims that he dreamed of killing him.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Lost Generation
programme.desc: A CVI malfunctions and kills a soon-to-be father. The investigation leads Liam and Renee to a fertility clinic. Renee finds out she is infertile and suspects that Taelon technology is affecting worldwide fertility.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Summit
programme.desc: Da'an leaves and doesn't being Liam along. Zo'or is frantic as to why Da'an left. Liam wants to help but Zo'or doesn't trust him because he doesn't have a CVI, so Liam agrees to be implanted.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Dark Matter
programme.desc: When the mother ship hits dark matter, the ship dos not begin to heal itself. Zo'or is left in an unconscious state and Sandoval takes control. He decides it is time to liberate the Earth from the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Keys to the Kingdom
programme.desc: The relic left by Ma'el is stolen from the mother ship. Zo'or threatens to destroy a major city if it isn't returned. Liam believes the final chapters contain information on synthesizing core energy.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Street Chase
programme.desc: Sandoval is watching via nanobots inside Street as she tries to decipher Ma'el's riddle. She tries to figure out how to escape from Sandoval and the Taelons forcing her to solve the riddle. She flashes back to childhood fears.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Trapped by Time
programme.desc: Liam and Renee learn of a facility where time travelers from the future are being held. They try to learn from them what happens to the Taelons. Sandoval's wife is used as a pawn to gain important information from him.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Atonement
programme.desc: Sandoval goes to Renee to request a trial to testify to atrocities against humanity committed by the Taelons. A manhunt for Sandoval begins when he quits and leaves the mother ship. Liam has to protect him on his way to the grand jury.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Strange assaults and several deaths may be related to a Doors/Taelon joint venture where Taelon core energy was used to heal people. It appears that the energy is being sucked back out of the patients.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Hearts and Minds
programme.desc: When Renee's boyfriend appears to her while he is imprisoned on the mother ship, Liam theorizes a special energy bond between the pair. Zo'or is upset by the human's betrayal and bans all humans from the mother ship.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Epiphany
programme.desc: The Taelons announce that they will all go into death stasis and wait on the mother ship for humans to discover how to create core energy and revive them. Zo'or and Da'an don't trust each other to be the last to submit to stasis.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A group of girls, prospecting for rich gold miners to marry, get involved with an unscrupulous wagon master.

programme.title: Gunsmoke

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt must defend a gunman he despises from townspeople who want to lynch him for a crime he didn't commit.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: To save his own life, murder witness Doc gives his word of honor to the killers (including Claude Akins) that he won't expose them.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt tries to save the life of a man dying of gangrene.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A group of outlaws try to force an old prospector to give up his gold.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: No one believes a boy's claims that he overheard an outlaw planning a robbery.

programme.title: Gunsmoke

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An ex-outlaw's attempt to hang up his gun proves difficult.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A legendary buffalo hunter invites the wrath of Indians when he sets out to cross their sacred hunting grounds.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Two men try to force a Chinese man out of Dodge.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Danny and a college professor are kidnapped and held as hostages, to be killed unless two members of a radical group are released from jail. McGarrett, backed by the Governor, refuses to comply with the ransom demands of the kidnappers.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A geothermal dynamics genius, plagued by personal financial problems and pressured by a loan shark, plots an extortion scheme that would trigger a man-made volcanic eruption, wiping out the entire city of Hilo.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Postcards from a psychopath taunting McGarrett to remember crime victims of the past precede a series of re-enacted murders. Eddie Josephs puts down the authorities by recreating murders featured in a series of Honolulu magazine articles.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett is on the trail of a suave crook who peddles his stolen goods to legitimate businessmen by socializing with fashion models and buyers. The wily thief has eluded the law by directing and supervising the hijacking of goods.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Notes threatening the life of the state Senate crime committee chairman bring McGarrett into the investigation. Handwriting analysis and a psychiatrist's diagnosis of someone's possible split personality become the prime clues.
programme.sub-title: Bomb, Bomb, Who's Got the Bomb?

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett steps in when powerful Hawaiian cattle baron Col. J.J. Farraday makes his own laws to avenge the beating death of his son. Farraday and his Hawaiian "cowboys" ready a hanging tree when Jay claims his brother was slain by a jealous husband.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A current wave of liquor store robberies and shootings are strangely linked to a fiveyear old bank robbery in which neither the quarter-million-dollar booty nor the thief was ever found.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A gangland-style slaying investigation takes a bizarre turn when an autopsy reveals the victim had two physical identities. Under suspicion for the murder are the victim's wife and his business partner.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Irreplaceable Lautrec and Gauguin art works mysteriously vanish from a millionaire's private collection despite three fail-safe electronic security systems.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Both bearing scars of gangland violence, McGarrett and an elegant dealer in objets d'art, Marni Howard, are sympathetically drawn together.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A Honolulu businessman accuses McGarrett and his investigative team of shaking him down for $100,000 "protection" money. Five-O is under heavy suspicion.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Wo Fat, international spy and relentless nemesis of McGarrett's, reappears in Hawaii in pursuit of a visiting foreign minister who is under the protection of the Five-O unit.
programme.sub-title: Presenting in the Center Ring Murder

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: A shamed Japanese banker ritualistically kills himself, and McGarrett want to know why. McGarrett demands answers from a prominent financial consultant and the deceased's assistant when Five-O discovers the pair are involved in an international swindle.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett digs into a 33-year-old mystery when he links a Honolulu murder to a missing, anthropologically valuable human fossil that disappeared in China shortly before Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: McGarrett's investigation of a murder is thwarted by a computer which has been fed with erroneous information in hopes of diverting the guilt for the crime away from the guilty party.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: Three troubled women take up armed robbery aboard scenic tour buses as a moneymaking project. The three women: Dina Hale, a lady with a hidden habit; Fay Scott, the mother of a desperately ill child; Margaret Hudson, an unhappily married housewife.
programme.sub-title: A Woman's Work is with a Gun

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: When Five-O nabs a shantytown ragamuffin for a minor theft, it sparks friction between McGarrett and a dedicated but impetuous female deputy public defender. The interference snags McGarrett's attempt to hide and protect the child from a hired killer.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O (Original)
programme.desc: The one-million-dollar reward offered for the return of five rare figurines touches off a global trail of murder and robbery that leads directly to McGarrett's jurisdiction.

programme.desc: MacGyver is drawn into a territorial dispute between an Indian reservation and an electric power company.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Using their unorthodox methods, the Coltons combine their individual talents to create a team of world-class bounty hunters in this MacGyver spinoff.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton reminisce about past adventures as Pete prepares for eye surgery to treat his Glaucoma.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and the Phoenix Foundation are overseeing the security and protection of Delasora during his trial. MacGyver is obsessed with the death of Murdoc and believes that he's still alive.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver's neighbor Kelly Dobbs overhears a plan to have accountant VictorNesbitt murdered. Victor is an accountant with one of Lyle Knox's holding companies and is planning on exposing the company.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver picks up his best friend's father to take him to his grandson's Bar Mitzvah and finds himself inadvertently involved in an FBI/CIA mission.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: After Prometheus, a crazed arsonist, is responsible for the death of his old friend, MacGyver sets out to solve the mystery of this madman and capture him.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver faces the strange and frightening world of Voodoo, as he tries to save his politically active neighbor from a deranged, underground death squad.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: A bump on the head takes MacGyver back to 7th century England where he searches for his roots and rescues a beautiful maiden from an evil queen.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver helps his good friend Dent train for a boxing match and finds that he must rescue Dent's daughter from gamblers who have kidnapped her.

programme.desc: While working at the Challenger Club, MacGyver finds he must save the local gang kids from Minton, the local gun supplier, who is planning to kill all the gang members as well as letting Brian Jefferies take the wrap for a murder he did not commit.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver fights to save a housing project after tenants have been forced out of their homes by corrupt money-hungry landlords.

programme.desc: MacGyver and his old friend Jack Dalton discover that inhabitants in a mountain valley live to be over 150 years old. Unfortunately, they also discover that it is the secret site of a heavy water plant used for nuclear weapon technology.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: When MacGyver becomes intertwined in a scheme to stop Chinese slave labor, he discovers that he has a son, Sam, who is also interested in bringing the fall of the man behind it all.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is a modern-day American hero with the uncanny ability to resolve a crisis in an extremely limited amount of time.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a riotous family reunion when Jim returns home to face his millionaire dad for the first time since he dropped out of society in the ‘60s, and Alex has his hands full with Jim’s voluptuous, overly amorous sister,

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The Taxi gang falls prey to hilarious fear for homeless Elaine’s romantic well-being when chivalrous Bobby allows her to live in his apartment while he is gone. Unexpectedly, he returns before she has found other quarters

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Hilarious sparks fly when Tony tries to fix up his divorced sister with Alex. Instead, she ends up falling for Reverend Jim and Tony goes outrageously overboard trying to break up the affair.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie the dispatcher has the dubious honor of being selected by his employer’s revenge-seeking wife to be her clandestine lover, and comedic panic grips the love lair when the boss shows up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s vicious letter to a hated critic is salvaged from the wastebasket and sent to the newspaper by a gleeful Louie, setting the stage for a wild and comical night when the critic, and the cabbies, decide to take in Bobby’s one-man play.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Latka Gravas is rejected by a young beauty, he sets out on an uproarious crash course to learn to be a swinging American Bachelor, a turnabout that works fantastically with the girls but turns off all of his friends at the garage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jim turns into a soothsayer when he warns of a bizarre catastrophe to befall Alex that also involves an affair with a beautiful blonde.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies discover that life on the outside is not so rosy when the Sunshine Cab Co. shuts down. They all end up hilariously assuming new careers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie turns into a jealous romantic when his overtures to accompany Elaine on her European vacation are rejected. Instead, Alex becomes the pretty cabbie's holiday companion on a tour of Europe's hot spots—culminating in a romantic rendezvous.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Riotous confusion prevails when Latka Gravas' split personalities prompt Elaine and Alex to take him to a psychiatrist's office, where the predicament takes on a wild new twist as Latka takes on Alex's personality.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Cabbie Jim Ignatowski's legendary psychic powers hilariously thrust him into the hectic world of television programming when he predicts that a TV show will be a hit.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie, at Zena's behest, comforts a girl with boyfriend woes, which leads to zany romantic tangles. Zena's rejected friend uses Louie's narrow shoulders to cry on, unleashing an unexpected comedy adventure that grants him some macho bragging rights.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie the dispatcher is gleeful, but Alex is aghast when the romantic affair between Alex and the new waitress at Mario's is complicated by another suitor.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A jubilant Tony returns to boxing as the manager of a young heavyweight, thrilling Louie, who anticipates recouping his wagering losses to Alex by betting against Banta's boxer.

programme.desc: Louie carries his actions and insults too far, prompting Elaine to enlist help from a women's organization. Soon, the dispatcher's lecherous laughter is transformed into comical pleading when he is booted out of his job.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Joy blossoms at the Sunshine Cab Co. when a triumphant Bobby Wheeler returns to proclaim that he's landed a TV series role. Louie, in his own charming way, puts a damper on the celebration.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The pretty new cabbie proves to be more than Alex can handle when she leaves the meter running, in an attempt to lure him into romance.

programme.desc: A young runaway wreaks havoc at the Sunshine Cab Co. when Alex and Elaine encourage the lad to return home. Jim wants to adopt him, and Louie wants the youngster jailed for not paying his fare.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Romance and merriment are on the menu for Tony and Alex when they double-date gorgeous twin models at a posh restaurant, only to have the intimate group grow to a crowd with the unwelcome additions of Jim and Alex's ex-wife.

programme.desc: Elaine blows a bundle on the Big Apple's hottest hair stylist for the social bash of the year.

programme.desc: After a man, who has been living in his father's shadow, inherits the family taffy factory to which he has never felt attached, he must choose whether or not to sell it.

programme.desc: The Angels must help a troubled young boy who wants to divorce his parents.

programme.desc: The Angels attempt to save a troubled marriage when the neglected wife encounters a man with whom she was once in love.

programme.desc: The Angels set out for a night of bowling and find enough needy patrons to "spare."

programme.desc: Ricky is a gas station attendant who just lost his job. Monica goes to help with the closing inventory, and to convince him that a door closing opens another door and he needs to pursue his poetry.

programme.desc: Tess helps Monica see the repercussions of her angry behavior when it affects the lives of some innocent strangers.

programme.desc: When a wealthy man loses everything, the angels show him that there are things in life more valuable than money.

programme.desc: A college freshman must choose between his father's vision of what his future should be his own conflicting instincts.

programme.desc: The Angels battle Satan over the fate of an unborn child.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: An ex-filmmaker, who lost his faith in God earlier in life following a tragic accident, must help a young film student rediscover hers.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Cat and Vincent take Agent Knox's offer to extricate and try to lead normal lives - but forces out of their control conspire to expose them and drag them back into the fray.

programme.title: Beauty & The Beast
programme.desc: Desperate to start over with Cat, Gabe tries to woo her by taking her on a romantic date. However, she has plans of her own regarding how to save Vincent - while also trying to plan Heather’s bachelorette party.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Breach
programme.desc: Magnus, Will and Kate respond to an anonymous call for help at a rundown, abandoned building. After an initial sweep of the first few floors it seems as though no one is there.

programme.title: Sanctuary: For King and Country
programme.desc: With Adam under tight security back at the Sanctuary, Magnus starts to process the events of the past 24 hours. She discloses to Will how she was associated with Adam back at Oxford in the late 1800s, and the turbulent role he played with The Five.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Vigilante
programme.desc: Knowing that the cure for Magnus’s illness can only be found in the hidden City, Will decides to release Adam from his restraints so he can show them how find the City’s access point.

programme.title: Sanctuary: The Hollow Men
programme.desc: Now with the real keystone in her possession, Magnus tells Adam Worth she is leaving to find the hidden city. Although he warns her of great danger there, she insists he stay behind and promises to bring back the cure to their radiation illness

programme.title: Sanctuary: Pax Romana
programme.desc: When we left Magnus, Will, Henry and Kate, they had met with a hostile welcome upon gaining access to the city of Praxis in Hollow Earth.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Hangover
programme.desc: Finding the front door left ajar and furniture turned over, Magnus arrives home to discover the building’s defense protocols disabled, no one in sight, and the Sanctuary in alarming disarray.

programme.title: Sanctuary: One Night
programme.desc: Will and Abby go on a dinner date, but on the way to the restaurant, their flirtatious exchange is abruptly halted when they are forced into a van at gunpoint.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Metamorphosis
programme.desc: The team gathers for their scheduled morning meeting with Will uncharacteristically absent. Kate goes to his room to find out where he is and discovers that although he feels normal, he doesn’t look the part.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Wingman
programme.desc: Will is getting ready for his big date with Abby while Henry prepares for a romantic night out with Erika. When the two meet in the hallway, they realize that they have made the same reservation for the same restaurant and the same time.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of a pyromaniac mutant who is causing mayhem, while Shalimar is forced to set aside her fear of fire to save Emma.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The team wrestles to contain Brennan's out-of-control mutant powers when he puts the mission to protect a senator's daughter in danger.

programme.title: Mutant X

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The team helps the crew of an ocean research station threatened by a prehistoric creature previously thought to be extinct.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Shalimar reluctantly agrees to contact her estranged father when the team learns his company is involved in genetic testing and manipulation.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: In the exciting season opener, the surviving members of Mutant X emerge from a deadly explosion to meet Lexa, who makes them begin to question fundamental assumptions about their world.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The Mutant X team must stop the auction of a highly lethal substance that a number of notorious international terrorists are vying to acquire.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: The Mutant X team is brought in to help a military base that has become infected with a deadly disease.

programme.title: Matlock: The Assassination (Part 2)
programme.desc: When his daughter is jailed for contempt Matlock takes over her case. Now it is up to him to uncover the truth behind a sinister cover-up that involves high government officials, including the Chief of Police, in a child pornography ring and a murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Vacation (Part 1)
programme.desc: When Matlock and his daughter Leanne arrive at a seaside resort to plan their new law partnership, they discover the manager has been murdered.

programme.title: Matlock: The Vacation (Part 2)
programme.desc: While vacationing with his daughter, Matlock tries to solve the murder of the hotel manager at their seaside resort.

programme.title: Matlock: The Ghost
programme.desc: A friend of Matlock’s, Mike Wilson, has been murdered and his wife has been accused of the crime.

programme.title: Matlock: The Singer
programme.desc: When a successful country music star is murdered, the promoter she fired – Steve Fisher – becomes the logical suspect.

programme.title: Matlock: The Juror
programme.desc: Matlock’s on jury duty, and the case against a man-about-town who stands to gain a fortune from his wife’s death seems airtight. Close examination of the evidence suggests otherwise to Ben.

programme.title: Matlock: The Fortune (Part 1)
programme.desc: When multi-millionaire Marvin Estes dies from an apparent suicide, leaving his fortune to supposed girlfriend Theresa LaValle, Matlock must find the missing beneficary.

programme.title: Matlock: The Fortune (Part 2)
programme.desc: When it’s discovered that a multimillionaire’s suicide is actually murder, Rick Stafford, the nephew recently cut out of his uncle’s will, is the #1 suspect. However, Matlock suspects other players in this high-stakes game of foul play

programme.title: Matlock: The Debt
programme.desc: Even though her former husband was a liar and a cheat, Leanne Matlock refuses to believe he was capable of murdering his philandering boss.

programme.title: Matlock: The Revenge
programme.desc: When testifying as a witness in a robbery case, Matlock is made to look like a fool. It soon becomes apparent that someone is playing tricks on him that threaten his credibility and safety.

programme.title: Matlock: The Obsession
programme.desc: Matlock is disturbed by frightening dreams that apparently give him clues to the murder of a doctor at a clinic patronized by celebrities. He even begins to wonder if he’s psychic.

programme.title: Matlock: The Divorce
programme.desc: It’s War of The Roses, Freudian style as divorcing psychiatrists forsake their couches for the courtroom. Matlock gets caught in the middle of a brutal battle that bruises more than egos.

programme.title: Matlock: The Final Affair (Part 1)
programme.desc: When Matlock looks into the double murder of a man studying for the ministry and the stabbing death of his wife, it looks like the case is closed when the wife’s lover is charged.

programme.title: Matlock: The Final Affair (Part 2)
programme.desc: When Matlock looks into the double murder of a man studying for the ministry and the stabbing death of his wife, it looks like the case is closed when the wife’s lover is charged.

programme.title: Matlock: The View
programme.desc: Viewing a heated argument from his hotel window, Matlock witnesses a murder involving two stars of a local theater production and an unhappy husband. When he helps investigate the case, his memory becomes a bit blurred.

programme.title: Matlock: The Play
programme.desc: Director of an amateur stage production, Doug Michaels fires would-be actor Ben Matlock from his role as a detective, claiming he’s seen kumquats with more talent. However, the tables soon turn when Michaels is accused of murdering the leading lady.

programme.title: Matlock: The Capital Offense
programme.desc: It’s a race against time as Matlock tries to save conman Adam Spangler from being executed for a murder he claims he never committed.

programme.title: Matlock: The Temptation
programme.desc: What begins as a simple home burglary evolves into a very strange series of events for professional thief Kevin Gilliam.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: While landing at Sao Paolo’s notoriously treacherous airport, TAM Airlines Flight #3054 hurtles down the runway at top speed and crashes into a building and adjacent gas station.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Pummeled by turbulence, West Caribbean Airways Flight #708 is flying through a moderate hurricane when the aircraft mysteriously drops from the sky and crashes on a remote Venezuelan farm.
programme.sub-title: The Plane That Flew Too High

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: With 248 elite American soldiers on board, Arrow Air Flight #1285 refuels in Newfoundland but just seconds after taking off, the plane crashes igniting a storm of controversy.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Investigators suspect there was a bomb on board Continental Express Flight #2574, but when the theory is dismissed, they eventually reveal a chilling story of good intentions gone horribly wrong.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Eight Manchester United football players are killed in a notorious Munich plane crash and when the surviving pilot is blamed, his struggle to clear his name spans more than two decades.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: When the rudder fails, the pilots of Northwest Airlines Flight #85 barely get their crippled 747 to Anchorage, Alaska for an emergency landing.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: After less than a minute in the air, Korean Air Cargo Flight #8509 slams into a field northeast of London. It is the airline’s fifth major accident in two years.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Just minutes from landing in San Diego, PSA Flight #182 collides with a Cessna and both planes crash into a quiet residential neighborhood below.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Minutes after taking off from Saudi Arabia’s Jeddah airport, Nigeria Airways Flight #2120 erupts into a fireball, killing all 261 people on board.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Gunshots are heard in the cabin of Pacific Southwest Airlines Flight #1771 and moments later the aircraft crashes into a remote California field.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Touching down on a narrow grass levee, the pilots of TACA Flight #110 manage one of the most remarkable landings in the history of commercial aviation.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: SAS Flight #686 lifts off in heavy fog at Milan’s Linate Airport but moments later collides with a Cessna on the runway. It is the worst accident in Italian aviation history.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: United Airlines Flight #232 is crippled when one of its three engines explodes, completely knocking out the hydraulic system and making it impossible to steer.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Just out of Honolulu the cargo door of United Airlines Flight 811 opens at an altitude of 33,000 feet, ripping a huge hole in the 747 taking out five rows of seats – and nine passengers with it.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: At the height of thunderstorm season in Arkansas, American Airlines 1420 ends in disaster. The MD80 ploughs off a wet runway down an embankment and breaks apart, killing 11 people.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: The pilot of Swissair Flight 111 smells smoke in the cockpit. Minutes later fire and complete electrical failure cause the MD11 to crash into the Atlantic killing all 229 passengers and crew on board.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Aeroperu Flight 603 bound from Lima, Peru to Santiago, Chile shows how a simple error and a lack of flight crew training can bring a giant, complex airliner to a deadly end.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Shortly after Air Alaska Flight 261 takes off, the stabilizer malfunctions. The pilots struggle to control the plane and it dives into the ocean. The eighty-eight passengers and crew on board die.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: There’s a hint of British summer in Spain for a Leicester couple hosting a Mexican Fiesta. A heatwave strikes a glampsite in the Sierra Nevada desert. And a storm threatens a Bristol artist’s perfectly planned painting retreat.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: An artist and a chef from Bath try to break into a bigger market with their painting and culinary retreats. Vegan gite owners are hoping to find the recipe for success in rural France. And in Sierra Nevada, a Dorset couple try to salvage their glampsite.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A British couple attempt to start their dream catering business. In France, Somerset expats take on an ambitious renovation. And a young couple stake everything on running a cycling holiday business in Spain.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Gite owners in France face plumbing problems for their first guests. A Buckinghamshire couple’s bid to buy their dream home hits problems. And two Bristol caterers face a colossal cooking challenge.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A catering couple from Bristol face a plumbing crisis. In France, a major swimming pool leak hits two expats’ holiday apartment business. And a Buckinghamshire couple’s bid to impress a VIP guest at their holiday cycling business suffers a setback.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A major leak threatens to drain much-needed finances from two expats’ holiday apartment business. In Spain, a Buckinghamshire couple’s cycling holiday venture hits the skids. And in France, a Yorkshire can-can dancer teaches her amateur troupe.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A Buckinghamshire couple face a battle to boost bookings for their cycling business. In France, a Yorkshire dancer prepares her amateur troupe for their first public performance. And a couple tackle rising costs as they race to open their bed & breakfast.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Foodies from Warwick have grand plans to start cooking holidays in rural France, three generations of a family from Kent open a French campsite, and a couple from Brighton run holiday lets in rural Spain.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple with a gite in France find their pool is infested with algae, a family running a French campsite have no hot water, and a couple with holiday lets in Spain are in money trouble.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A Brighton couple host a yoga retreat at their Spanish apartments, a Bristol family hits a crisis when their UK house sale falls through, and gite owners in France are forced to drop their prices.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple from Bristol buy a house with a gite in France, a family running a French campsite face a tough inspection, and a couple with holiday lets in Spain rush to finish their renovations.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Gite owners in France open a cooking school, a couple from Bristol finally start their businesses, and there’s a Mexican party to celebrate a successful season in Spain.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A family from Teesside club together to buy a rundown property to turn into a restaurant in Spain. A couple from Maidstone take on a cycling tour business in Girona. And two Londoners leave the city life to run a high-end holiday let in rural France.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Holiday hosts in France are reviewed by a high-end travel website. Cycling tour operators on the Costa Brava struggle with logistics. And in Spain, renovation work pushes a Teesside family to a breaking point.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple from Manchester become accidental olive farmers. A Teesside family opens the doors to their new restaurant in Spain. And there’s an unexpected and devastating turn for cycle tour operators in Girona.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A storm threatens to devastate the crop for Manchester olive farmers in Spain. An ex-teacher has plans to tempt the French with afternoon tea. And a Teesside family becomes the victim of their own success at their Spanish restaurant.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: It’s the moment of truth as it’s harvest time for olive farmers in Spain. Plumbing problems threaten the launch of a tearoom in France. And can a Teesside family cope with Spain’s fiesta?

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Steve Stallion plans to open a bar on the Costa Blanca with his feisty mother-in-law, a couple of novices leave Scotland for a bed & breakfast in France, and British fishing charter boss Dean Hoyle hands over his beloved Costa del Sol boat business.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A family race to open their dream bar but will the bank manager save the day? Two brand new bed & breakfast owners welcome their first guests in the French Dordogne. And can the newest fisherman on the Costa del Sol impress his first customers?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Tom Cruise
programme.desc: Tom Cruise steps into the spotlight, taking the lead in Risky Business, but when Paul Brickman is forced to change his ending will that put an end to Tom’s dreams?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Tom Cruise
programme.desc: Tom Cruise enters the danger zone as Tony Scott pushes the limits of the Navy and his actors to achieve his sun-kissed vision.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Tom Cruise
programme.desc: Having proved he’s a star, Tom now wanted to test himself as an actor. While remaining in the shadow of Dustin Hoffman’s performance in Rain Man, Tom is able to get his first Oscar nomination by breaking out of his mold in Born on the 4th of July.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Tom Cruise
programme.desc: Tom’s next two films will launch the careers of everyone around him while nearly delivering him that elusive Oscar. A Few Good Men is once again a win for Jack Nicholson rather than Tom, but Jerry Maguire brings him in reach of the Oscar.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Tom Cruise
programme.desc: Tom Cruise tests his limits, becoming a producer and taking on ever riskier stunts. But it’s his personal life that nearly sends his career spinning.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Tom Cruise
programme.desc: Tom pushes everyone to the limit to deliver a fitting sequel to Top Gun 30 years later. After Tony Scott’s untimely death, Tom takes the lead finding a story that speaks to him, with real planes and real danger.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: J.R.R Tolkien’s children’s book and trilogy take the world by storm, appealing to the fans its author would least expect. After several failed attempts to adapt the books and one half-successful animated movie, an unlikely hero takes on the film.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: With the clock ticking Peter Jackson has to find a studio to save his work in progress. Only one studio is willing to take the gamble on three films made at once adapting an unwanted property led by an unproven director on the other side of the world.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: After a successful teaser at Cannes, the team races to complete the first film on time. Meanwhile filming begins to take a toll on the cast and crew. As injuries pile up, the most demanding scene in the trilogy nearly breaks them.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: The trilogy hinges on the technological magic being developed at WETA but internal strife threatens to bring the whole thing crashing down. As the saga reaches its conclusion Peter Jackson is reluctant to let go.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: The studio that backed the films takes a gamble too far. Peter Jackson struggles in vain to avoid the burden of directing. In the midst of a grueling shoot one of the dwarves is sent packing.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: The Lord of the Rings
programme.desc: Peter Jackson pushes the bounds both on the page and on screen. But will audiences like what they see? A legendary chapter comes to a close leaving its mark on the film industry.

programme.title: Mike Mignola: Drawing Monsters
programme.desc: When Mike Mignola created Hellboy, he unleashed a visionary comic book character and launched an entire universe populated by unique heroes, misfits and monsters.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: The ’80s saw an explosion of European supercars. But U.S. designer Jerry Wiegert believed America could do more than compete — with his jet fighter on wheels: the Vector W8.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: The DeLorean made history on screen. Off screen, the rise and fall of John DeLorean’s company is a story with more twists and turns than any Hollywood movie.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: The Trans Am pushed muscle cars to the limit, becoming a hero of film (Smokey and the Bandit) and television (Knight Rider). But in chasing greatness, did PonGac push too far?

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: Acer just two years, GM was ready to kill the CorveKe. But a rogue group of engineers defied orders, working in secret on what would become America’s Sports Car.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: Every car line has an iconic year — the ’57 Chevy, the ’69 Camaro, and of course the ’89 Batmobile, a revoluGonary model inspired by — and nearly destroyed by — Tim Burton.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: When the US military needed a stronger, tougher tactical vehicle, the answer was the Hummer. But could it survive Beverly Hills? With Schwarzenegger at the wheel, it just might.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: The Meyers Manx Dune Buggy was a garage-built experiment turned cultural icon. But would the surfer success story drown in a flood of copycats?

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A pedestrian in Chicago loses her cool when one of her neighbors bicycles on the sidewalk; in South Carolina, a man challenges a neighbor for using a handicapped parking spot when she doesn't look handicapped.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Two Texas neighbors engage in a fiery debate about where dogs should relieve themselves; next door neighbors in England are embroiled in a battle allegedly over noise disturbances; a California woman accuses a landlord of blocking in her car.
programme.sub-title: Don't Put Your Hands On Me

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A Floridian fisherman turns the tables on a territorial neighbor; in Tennessee, a property line dispute makes a neighbor fear for her life.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A San Francisco man blows his lid when some neighbors don't park properly on a steep hill; in Denver, a dog trainer claims her unwelcome puppy advice ends a friendship with the woman opposite; in Virginia, neighbors engage in a shouting match.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: An East London woman battles a swarm of her neighbor's bees taking over her bedroom; in Texas, a new mother is shocked to witness her neighbor playing with fire; a Georgia farmer temporarily blocks a school bus.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A late-night reveler shows up unannounced to a house party and gets a rude welcome; in Scottsdale, Ariz., a barefoot woman blocks the car of two men she accuses of trespassing in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: An Idaho family's next-door neighbor goes to battle with them over the height of their lawn; in Florida, authorities carrying out a home eviction realize they are at the wrong address; a Kansas neighborhood park is terrorized by two loose dogs.
programme.sub-title: Stay the Hell Off My Property

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Battling neighbors in San Antonio compare land surveys to determine whose yard owns an extra foot of land; a group of Florida college students are confronted by a man with a weapon; a Houston woman confronts her online critic.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: When a Houston family is denied access to a Fourth of July party at the neighborhood pool, verbal fireworks are set off; in New York, a man pulls out a switchblade during a school PTA meeting; in Pennsylvania, a woman taunts her neighbor.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: On a full moon, a stranger sets up an erotic photo shoot on a neighbor's porch; two Floridian landscapers are shocked when a woman begins hurling insults; a tenant becomes incensed by his landlord's unannounced visits and decides to lock her out.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Sacramento, a neighbor mistakenly believes two women exchanging hair products in the park are actually selling drugs; a belligerent woman smashes her neighbor's window in Virginia; neighbors in Canada clash about a lawn care specialist.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A St. Louis family is alarmed when a neighbor bangs on their door with a hammer; when their leaf blower disappears, two sisters in Virginia decide to confront the neighbors.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A newly-married couple face a hostile neighborhood when building a tiny home in Missouri out of shipping containers; brawling neighbors in a New York bodega leaves one with a broken jaw; in Alabama, a man claims the neighbors stole his dog.

programme.title: 60 days in jail
programme.desc: 60 Days In Jail sends undercover volunteers into jails to expose the real stories of life inside. These harrowing journeys serve a higher purpose, helping those in charge improve conditions. Facing danger and loneliness, can they last?

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: Embarking on parallel paths to the top, The Rock and Triple H battle each other both in the ring and behind the scenes; Freddie Prinze Jr. and luminaries including Kevin Owens, Johnny Gargano and John "Bradshaw" Layfield break down this epic rivalry.

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: Hulk Hogan and Randy Savage were two men who pushed each other to greatness; they were close friends outside the ring and bitter enemies when the bell rang.
programme.sub-title: Hulk Hogan vs. "Macho Man" Randy Savage

programme.title: WWE Smack Talk
programme.desc: WWE Hall of Famers Edge and Beth Phoenix are welcomed by Booker T, Peter Rosenberg and Jackie Redmond to explore exclusive stories and never-before-seen footage; Edge reveals what the rivalry between himself and John Cena meant to him.

programme.title: WWE Smack Talk
programme.desc: WWE Hall of Famer Shawn Michaels discusses DX and how the group revolutionized an industry; a conversation on how the rivalry between HHH and Mick Foley helped define both of their hall of fame careers.

programme.title: WWE Smack Talk
programme.desc: Rey Mysterio and his son Dominik Mysterio join WWE Hall of Famer Booker T, radio personality Peter Rosenberg, and host Jackie Redmond to discuss the rise of one of the greatest masked superstars in wrestling history.

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: The early '90s rivalry between Jake Roberts and Randy Savage.
programme.sub-title: Jake "The Snake" Roberts vs. "Macho Man" Randy Savage

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: John Cena and Randy Orton first met at WWE's developmental training in 2002; Freddie Prinze Jr. breaks down this great rivalry with Booker T, Natalya Neidhart, D-Von Dudley and John Bradshaw Layfield.

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: For two decades, Undertaker and Shawn Michaels were the cornerstones of WWE; a roundtable of experts composed of Freddie Prinze Jr., Kevin Nash, Cody Rhodes, Beth Phoenix and John Bradshaw Layfield shed light on this notable battle.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Codslow suffers under three immortal tyrants. The pilgrims aid a family against the rulers who draw power from pearls, paper, and wine. Pigsy nearly roasts before Monkey devises a plan to free the land.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Pigsy searches for a missing girl, finding she’s married to a slug monster. Disguised as the slug, he lives with vain Hai-Min—until she notices her husband isn’t so slimy after all.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In a volcanic land plagued by quakes, a catfish demon and a faceless shape-changer fight. A priest claims one pilgrim is the impostor. Distrust splits the group apart.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The pilgrims meet a man digging a mountain tunnel for 22 years. Tripitaka insists they help, but Monkey’s magic shortcut angers him. Banished Monkey leaves them vulnerable to grave danger.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The King of Unicorns seeks Monkey’s magic staff as a gift. Using a magic ring, he captures Tripitaka and weakens Monkey. Pigsy, tempted by Chun-Shou, must resist to save his master.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The Grey Gloves Devil kills villages with hypnotic eyes. While Pigsy lags, a woman mistakes Tripitaka for her lost son. Captured, Pigsy must escape before the Devil strikes again.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: A village is ravaged by locusts led by Demon Queen Grasshopper, chasing the magic Lake Lok-Nor. Can the pilgrims stop her swarms, or will she turn them all into pigs?

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Honored guests of a prime minister, the pilgrims face black magicians and bandits. Tripitaka falls ill with Tibetan Fever, while Pigsy hunts a vampire and uncovers a shocking truth.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In a blizzard, starving pilgrims hide in a cave. Monkey tricks Pigsy into “sacrifice,” making Tripitaka believe he ate his disciple. Overcome with grief, he is possessed by Pigsy’s spirit.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the Red Hog kingdom, pigs are gods and Pigsy is crowned king. But the ruler is a demon who slew the old king. Rebels help Monkey and Sandy save the princess and stop the cult.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In a ghostly village, demons and witches await the pilgrims. If believed in, they live again. One by one, the travellers are lured into deadly traps of illusion and betrayal.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: A God cursed two lovers, aging Yu-Lee into the Well’s keeper. To restore her youth, Tripitaka must drink. Chaos ensues when Pigsy and Sandy drink the water—becoming pregnant.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the Fire Queen’s land, volcanoes block the way. Only her magic fan can douse the flames, but since her husband left her for a human, winning her aid proves a fiery challenge.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: To cross Nightmare Land, Monkey disguises Tripitaka as a demon woman with magic. Tested by the King of Bad Dreams, their fate hangs on whether he sees through the disguise.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Near India, the pilgrims are stopped by the King of Geological Ages. Tripitaka is shackled with the Iron Collar of Death. Pigsy recognizes the queen—can they save their master in time?

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Monkey, Pigsy, and Sandy grow tired of their journey and part ways. Monkey returns to the Kingdom of Fruit and Flowers, reflecting on the mission and his restless spirit.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The evil Dogs of Plague, followers of the Great Hound of Hell, set out to destroy Monkey, Pigsy, Sandy, and Tripitaka in a battle of wit and strength.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Shotenki and his demon master Kokufki lure men from nearby villages to their casino in Ittakudo, where gambling consumes their lives and fortunes.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Patrice Evra
programme.desc: Today, we’ve got a guest who has lived several lives in one. On the pitch, he was a fierce left-back who collected trophies like kids collect Pokémon cards. Off the pitch, he’s become the man of Monday mornings.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ben Whittaker
programme.desc: A guest who has a huge drive and work ethics and has overcome some hurdles that have possibly made him stronger. His entrances make Harry Styles look underdressed at Coachella.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Kaya Scodelario
programme.desc: She became a household name at just 14years old, when she burst onto our screens in the groundbreaking series Skins. Since then, she’s pursued her acting dreams all the way to Hollywood — and built quite an impressive career.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ross Kemp
programme.desc: A courageous man who's living proof you can reinvent yourself more times than a Love Island contestant. He went from pulling pints in the Queen Vic to pulling BAFTAs for documentaries…

programme.title: Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Lucy Bronze
programme.desc: Tonight’s guest has lived that journey. From a football-loving kid to one of the world’s finest players, she’s lifted major trophies, captained teams, and become a role model for millions. Lucy Bronze welcome on the Yellow Couch.
programme.sub-title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Lucy Bronze

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Charlotte Crosby
programme.desc: She first burst onto our screens on Geordie Shore—back when her biggest commitment was to Jägerbombs and fake tan. Since then she’s gone from wild nights in Newcastle towinning Celebrity Big Brother.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: To get dynamite, terrorists ruin an ex-convict's (Earl Holliman) plans for a new life with his son (Vincent Van Patten).

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A prominent jockey suspected of throwing horse races is investigated by Ironside. Guest star: Joel Grey.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Vengeful brothers (Nico Minardos, Cal Bellini) hamper Ironside's investigation of serial murders; guest Victoria Racimo.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Several theater hopefuls have motives for an actress's murder by heroin injection; guests Angel Tompkins, Sally Struthers.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside tries to prevent a hung jury in a gangster's trial by proving jury tampering; guest Andrew Duggan.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Nephews threaten to expose their uncle (Theodore Bikel) as an illegal immigrant if he won't let them use his shop to sell marijuana.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: An idealistic youth lets himself be taken hostage to force the release of an activist prisoner; guests Simon Oakland, David Soul.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: An angry parolee is suspected of threatening a parole officer (William Shatner) who is tough on drug offenders.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A small-time gangster (Phillip Pine) warring with a mob boss hires a hit man (James Olson) to kill Ironside.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A mobster (James Drury) recognizes an officer assigned to infiltrate a ring stealing credit cards.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Neophyte policewoman Fran Belding tips the police's hand in a crackdown on gamblers. Guest star: Bobby Darin.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: The murder of a parole candidate leads to an ex-newspaperman and a beautiful spirit medium (Barbara Rush).

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: The probe of an officer's death uncovers a connection between the widow (Vera Miles) and a hostile boy.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: The fiancé (Soon-Teck Oh) of Ironside's Korean foster child (Miko Mayama) is accused of robbing his boss.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A blackmailing actor is slain during a performance attended by Ironside; guests Roddy McDowall, Anne Archer, Barbara Hale.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Fran agonizes over her cousin's suicide, until occurrences lead her to think he still lives; guest Christine Belford.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A stranger (Michael Callan) who gave Brown first aid turns out to be a soldier wanted for killing a WAC.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside poses as a patient in a nursing home with a high death rate; guests Ruth Roman, John Carradine.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A bitter officer (David Carradine) is accused of killing the mobster who murdered his partner; guest Jackie Coogan.

programme.title: Murdertown: Dartford
programme.desc: In 1993, 16-year-old Claire Tiltman is found dying by the roadside. Her killer disappears into the night. More than 20 years later, Colin Ash Smith is finally brought to trial. Jurors hear of how he knew Claire, and even went to her funeral.

programme.title: Murdertown: Dundee
programme.desc: Aged 15, Robbie McIntosh walked into a fish and chip shop to announce that a woman had been killed on the iconic Law Hill. Police revealed the victim had been stabbed dozens of times. But they never imagined that the culprit was the teenager.

programme.title: Murdertown: Barnsley
programme.desc: In 2015, a 69-year-old man is found stabbed in his home. At the scene, forensics uncover a receipt from a nearby cashpoint. CCTV at the bank reveals a woman using the victim's card to withdraw cash. Who is she? And how does she relate to the murder?

programme.title: Murdertown: Pontypridd
programme.desc: In 2014, a woman goes missing after a night drinking in the local pubs. CCTV finds her walking home arm in arm with another drinker. He just happens to be a former butcher. Police soon realise he has put his trade to use by dismembering his victim.

programme.title: Murdertown: Tamworth
programme.desc: In 1994, a gang kill a woman who manages a building society and tie up her husband, before robbing the building society of large sums of cash. But despite making a tearful plea for help, the injured husband’s story doesn’t tally.

programme.title: Murdertown: Watford
programme.desc: In 2000, a young woman is stabbed to death while walking her dog in a picturesque park in the town. A suspect is seen running semi-naked across the M1 motorway. It takes detectives weeks to identify the killer as a local man called Leon Amos.

programme.title: Murdertown: Huddersfield
programme.desc: In 2014 a sex offender called Robert Hind goes missing from a bail hostel. Cops fear he’s absconded to commit crime. The town is scoured. But then the cops learn that the sex offender hasn’t absconded - he’s been murdered.

programme.title: Murdertown: Sunderland
programme.desc: Throughout the early '90s young boys would be found dead after sniffing glue and being trapped in derelict buildings which caught fire. Cops soon found they were actually being systematically murdered by a man called Steven Grieveson.

programme.title: Murdertown: Brighton
programme.desc: In 2015 a man visits a tarot card reader. Within an hour she’s dealt out the death card and he’s confessed to a murder. When cops arrive they discover he’s been living at home with his victim’s body for days.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Portsmouth: Ten-part true crime series with Katherine Kelly examining the UK's most shocking murders and the impact they've left on local communities. First up: Portsmouth.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Wrexham: Katherine Kelly explores how Jordan Davidson left an entire community in fear, when his series of increasingly violent crimes culminated in murder.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Middlesbrough: Katherine Kelly examines Middlesbrough murderer Reginald Wilson, described by criminal psychologists as one of the most dangerous men ever to be assessed.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Lorraine Thorpe hit headlines as Britain's youngest female double-killer. But more deaths were about to rock the Suffolk town. Katherine Kelly explores.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Darlington: Katherine Kelly explores cannibal killer David Harker. One of the UK's most disturbed psychopaths, his crime rocked Darlington, causing a second horrific murder.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Katherine Kelly examines how the murder of 18-year-old Louise Smith rocked the city of Bristol, after she disappeared on Christmas Eve in 1995

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Greenock: Katherine Kelly examines the 1986 murder of 16-year-old Elaine Doyle. One of Scotland's longest-running murder enquiries, it took 26 years to find her killer.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Nuneaton: Katherine Kelly explores the senseless murder of 15-year-old Naomi Smith and how a series of breakthroughs and DNA evidence led police to her killer.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Grimsby: Katherine Kelly looks into the 2011 murder of Adam Vincent, a killing so brutal it sparked North Lincolnshire's biggest police investigation in over a century.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Croydon: Katherine Kelly explores the tragic death of Cassandra McDermott. It took a brutal attack on another woman and a decade of chasing before her killer was caught

programme.title: Murdertown With Anita Rani
programme.desc: With first-hand testimony from family members, police officers, witnesses and reporters, we shine a light on some of Britain's darkest murder locations, examining the crimes that rocked these communities.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Paul Novak
programme.desc: Paul Novak was a thrill-seeking paramedic who loved the hustle and bustle of the city. His wife Catherine was a homemaker and volunteer who preferred small town life. Unable to reconcile their differences, Paul decided to plan the perfect crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Janbaz Tarin
programme.desc: Raneem Oudeh came to the UK from Syria to escape war, looking forward to a brighter future for herself and her son. Everything was falling into place until she met Janbaz Tarin, a man who saw no boundary between love, obsession, and extreme violence.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: George Worgan
programme.desc: Kelly and George Worgan looked like the perfect parents, playing happy families on Facebook with pictures of days out. But behind closed doors, they had financial struggles and rows. When their marriage ended in murder, no one saw it coming.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Tia Young
programme.desc: George Young worked his fingers to the bone to give his loved ones a better future: his wife, Tia, their three sons, even his friend Tim Lee. How was this generosity repaid? With deception, infidelity, and a plot to cash in on his death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Chacey Poynter
programme.desc: Bob Poynter was old enough to be Chacey’s father. And he was married. But those were minor obstacles to her. However, when their romance hit the skids, Chacey enlisted yet another of her lovers to help bring the marriage to a brutal end.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: David Clark
programme.desc: Melanie and David Clark’s marriage was the definition of toxic. He was controlling and angry, and she had affairs. They seemed unable to tear themselves apart - until one violent incident ended their marriage for good.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Nat Fraser
programme.desc: Arlene McInnes and Nat Fraser had a whirlwind romance, marrying and having their first child within 18 months of meeting. But Nat soon revealed himself as a womanising, violent bully. When she rebelled against him, he hatched a plot to punish her.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Brian Burns
programme.desc: Brian and Carla Burns were both medics in their 40s when they met and fell in love. But married bliss didn’t last, and divorce proceedings were messy. Carla disappeared, and fingers pointed at Brian, but he was ready with a bizarre explanation.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Lois Riess
programme.desc: Lois and David Riess were grandparents and business owners. Lois was also a gambling addict who would do anything to feed her habit. David became the first victim of a murderous rampage that earned Lois the title of America’s most wanted grandmother.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Keland Hill
programme.desc: Tiffany and Keland Hill were military veterans with a shining service history. But while Tiffany still lived to serve, Keland lived to control, stalk and terrorise his wife. He was extremely violent, but no one predicted his final act of brutality.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ricardo Godinho
programme.desc: Aliny and Ricardo Godinho had four children and a relationship history that spanned 17 years. While Aliny put her kids at the centre of everything she did, for Ricardo they were a morbid obsession, and one that would lead to a shocking, brutal crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ramanodge Unmathallegadoo
programme.desc: At the age of 16, Sana Muhammad had an arranged marriage to Ramanodge Unmathallegadoo, a man almost twice her age. She managed to escape the unhappy relationship and found new love, but Ramanodge decided she would never get to enjoy her new life.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Frances Hall
programme.desc: When Frances Araiza met Bill Hall Jr, he was a 16 year old with big ideas. Fast forward three decades and they were grandparents with a multi-million dollar empire. But behind closed doors, their marriage story was heading for an explosive finale.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Faria Khan
programme.desc: After leaving an arranged marriage she claimed was abusive, Faria Khan could have moved on. But she wouldn’t be satisfied until estranged husband Nawajid was dead. And she knew exactly who to ask to help her.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Steven McDowell
programme.desc: Steven and Crystal McDowell were never a good match, and for years after they split, Steven deluded himself that reconciliation was just around the corner. Then, Crystal disappeared during a deadly hurricane. Was she the victim of a natural disaster?

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Glyn Dix
programme.desc: Glyn Dix met Hazel while he was serving a life term for a brutal rape and murder. After convincing her he had been framed, the couple fell for one another. But five years after his release from prison, Glyn finally showed Hazel his true colours.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Colleagues and customers at the pharmacy owned by Jessica and Mitesh Patel recall how abusive, controlling and sometimes violent Mitesh was towards his wife. But they had no idea that he was hatching a plan to brutally end the marriage.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Carole and Harry Jarvis were married for over 30 years. But he met a new woman, heiress Rita Heyster, and decided it was time to move on. In a bizarre, twisted scheme, Harry and Rita plotted to murder Carole and cover up her death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: William Walker was a firefighter and paramedic with a reputation for helping strangers. Little wonder that debt-ridden Uloma Curry was attracted to him. Within weeks of their wedding she was plotting to get her hands on his cash.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Micah Rine's family had a bad feeling about Thomas Pate. He seemed inauthentic. He had a troubled past. But nothing could persuade Micah that he wasn't the man of her dreams. By the time Micah realised Thomas had a dark side, it was too late.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Alberto Benitez is a successful police instructor in Kingsville, Texas. When he breaks up with his girlfriend, her obsession turns his life into a vicious game of survival.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: A kind-hearted fifth grader befriends a strange girl in her neighborhood. Little does she know that her good intentions will have life-altering consequences.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Married To Madness
programme.desc: When Susan Zarriello's ex-husband David unleashes a sadistic torrent of cyber attacks 15 years after their divorce, Susan realizes he's been watching her for years.

programme.title: Someone They Knew
programme.desc: In 2001, University of South Carolina student Shelton Sanders disappeared while planning a friend's bachelor party.

programme.title: Someone They Knew
programme.desc: After a work party went late, Ramona Krotine decided it was time to call it a night. But she never made it home-or did she?

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 057
programme.desc: Murder of Danielle Clause – Danielle was beaten to death with a rock in Ventura, CA. The killer wasn’t caught for 30 years until DNA and genealogy linked Larry Welch, who had died 20 years earlier, denying justice to Danielle’s family.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 057

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 109
programme.desc: When a Texas prosecutor was murdered, followed months later by a judge and his wife, police hunted the killers—a disgraced ex-judge and his wife seeking revenge. The victims had helped disbar him. The case broke when one of the killers confessed.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 109

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 037
programme.desc: Murder of Betsy Wiesenfeld – After a warning text, Betsy’s debit card was used at an ATM. Surveillance linked the user to Doug Berry, a fired contractor. Her body was found nearby, and Berry pled guilty to her murder.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 037

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 001
programme.desc: Roxie Faizy was murdered by her fiancé, Brian McMahon, after she discovered his infidelity and planned to leave him. Fearing financial loss, he killed her in a fit of rage. The motive: money.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 001

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 028
programme.desc: Murder of Andrea Boyer – Andrea was found murdered and sexually assaulted at her veterinary clinic. DNA evidence led investigators to Michael Renard Jackson, a local man with a history of sexual assaults.
programme.sub-title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 028

programme.title: Someone They Knew
programme.desc: Girly Chew had been worried about her safety. When she didn't show up for work, her friends and coworkers became concerned.

programme.title: Someone They Knew
programme.desc: David Coffin's house burned down with him in it, but it wasn't the fire that killed him. It was the bullet in his head.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Fat Bandit
programme.desc: A string of bank robberies in Winnipeg confound local police. Most bank-robbers are addicts, usually quite thin. This new man doesn't fit the profile: this bandit is fat.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hate Crime
programme.desc: A young Orthodox Jewish man is in Pittsburgh to celebrate Passover with family when he is gunned down simply because of the way he is dressed.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Pointing to Murder
programme.desc: A withered corpse is found half-buried in a field beside a theme park. Too decayed to identify properly, detectives have only the leathery fingers of one hand to work from.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Model Killer
programme.desc: A gorgeous young model is bludgeoned to death in her downtown apartment. The wounds to her head are so severe police initially presume she's been shot.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Burning Obsession
programme.desc: In 1988, a promiscuous 22-year old boy from the Sikh community has one affair too many and ends up losing his life. Diligent detective work and DNA help police nail the killer who believed he had gotten away with murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Jeweler's Wife
programme.desc: The wife of a successful jeweler is found dead in their home. The jeweler immediately falls under suspicion, but he's not alone.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Great Despisers
programme.desc: A 19 year old man comes home one night to discover that his family had all been savagely murdered. Could it be the insurance money and a movie called "The Great Despisers" that motivated the killers to perpetrate such violence?

programme.title: 72 Hours: Cold Hit
programme.desc: In 1994, a troubled single mother is found raped and murdered in her apartment. Was it one of the volatile men in her life? All possible suspects are eliminated and the case goes cold for three years, until a nine-year old girl is brutally raped.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Evil Eyes
programme.desc: A dead woman is found in a park. It’s learned the deceased is a divorced landlady of a group home for transients. The suspect list is long; the clues to follow are few.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Angel of Death
programme.desc: An angel of mercy turns out to be an angel of death when the number of deaths in an Indiana Intensive Care Unit skyrockets. One astute nurse believes there must be more to this than just natural causes.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Game
programme.desc: 1995 - Houston, Texas. A lonely man calls a dating service and gets more than he bargained for when he is met at gunpoint and robbed by his “dates”. The women, dubbed “Thelma & Louise”, lure men with the promise of sex but then drug and rob them.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Murder on Campus
programme.desc: The bizarre murder of a world-renowned anthropologist over the Christmas holidays shocks staff and students at the university where she teaches.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Violinist
programme.desc: Surgically clean body parts start turning up on a highway. Stranger still, they have been drained of every drop of blood.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Kidnapped
programme.desc: A wealthy Asian girl is kidnapped in Vancouver. When the kidnappers make the fateful error of using the young girl’s cell phone, police are able to track their movements and capture the assailants.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Sweet Killer
programme.desc: An aging hippy is going through bad times. When he's found dead in his home with a gut of antifreeze, it's a closed case. Then a shocking confession reveals a maelstrom of lies and a story of cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Bull's Eye
programme.desc: A Girl Guide leader is found dead on the floor of her bedroom. When an autopsy reveals a bullet lodged in her brain, detectives learn they’re investigating a murder.
