programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Lottery
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey are brought in when a lottery jackpot is being claimed by multiple people. They must decide who has the real ticket and whose winning ticket is actually counterfeit. Meanwhile, Lacey and Harvey prepare for an IRS audit.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Entrapment
programme.desc: During an underground investigation of a notorious narcotics dealer, Cagney crosses the line to entrapment and expects Lacey to commit perjury on her behalf. Lacey must then decide if she stands by her partner or admit to knowing nothing about it.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Clinic
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey's (Tyne Daly) investigation of the fire-bombing of an abortion clinic places them on opposing sides over this controversial issue. When a patient is killed in the blast, they must decide if it was one murder or two.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Mothers And Sons
programme.desc: The detective must crack a mother's testimony on the alibi of her son who is accused of robbery and assault while Lacey (Tyne Daly) must deal with her own son's problems at school. Also starring Sharon Gless as Christine Cagney.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Filial Duty
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate the robbery and murder of a 70-year-old recluse as Charlie Cagney (guest star Dick O'Neill) is hospitalized with pneumonia. Meanwhile, a pregnant Lacey must learn to adapt her work routine.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Old Ghosts
programme.desc: Cagney is branded as a coward after a robbery suspect is able to elude her during a chase. She is suspended from duty, leaving Lacey to clear her name. Meanwhile, Cagney's brother Brian visits from California and checks in on their father.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Power
programme.desc: When Cagney is placed in charge of the 14th Precinct during Lt. Samuels' vacation, her fellow detectives accuse her of being on a power trip. Meanwhile she is disappointed that one of her first assignments is to force Lacey to go on maternity leave.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Play It Again, Santa
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) goes undercover with Det. Jonah Newman (guest star Dan Shor) to investigate a series of disappearing Santa Clauses and issues with music rights. Also starring Tyne Daly as Mary Beth Lacey and Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Rapist
programme.desc: When Lacey goes out on maternity leave, Cagney's is given a temporary partner temporary partner, Sara Jones. Jones becomes obsessed with a rape investigation and increasingly frustrated with the length of time it is taking to arrest the suspect.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Act Of Conscience
programme.desc: While Lacey is on maternity leave, Cagney is assigned a controversial new partner who's past of turning in other cops who have participated in illegal activity makes the rest of the 14th precinct question how long he will stay among them.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: D.W.I.
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) goes undercover with Det. Jonah Newman (guest star Dan Shor) to investigate a series of disappearing Santa Clauses and issues with music rights. Also starring Tyne Daly as Mary Beth Lacey and Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Gimp
programme.desc: While investigating a series of muggings of disabled persons, Cagney (Sharon Gless) gets a first-hand look at the problems they face and becomes romantically involved with a man (guest star James Stacy) who is handicapped and advocating for change.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Family Connections
programme.desc: Cagney has to rush to Lacey's side at the hospital, hoping that she can make it before the baby is delivered. Being around Lacey and her family makes Cagney have second thoughts about her life as a singleton. Cagney's father has a new girlfriend.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Post Partum
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) becomes involved in a case where a West Point cadet is charged with possession of cocaine and is refusing to help himself due to his honor code. Meanwhile, Lacey's (Tyne Daly) father pays her a visit after a 30-year absence.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Man Who Shot Trotsky
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) receive a second opportunity to nail a notorious narcotics dealer as Petrie (Carl Lumbly) and Isbecki (Martin Kove) go 'off-Broadway' to pursue a murder case. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Exit Stage Center (S04E19)
programme.desc: When a famous actress dies, the first assumption is suicide. However, as Cagney and Lacey investigate, they soon discover that she was murdered and everyone in the cast and crew of the play she was in has a probable motive for killing her.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Capitalism
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate the murder of a prominent and well-respected Cambodian immigrant lawyer and discover his business might not be as it appears. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Extradition
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) are sent to Los Angeles to extradite an old 'perp' as Cagney meets her brother Brian's (guest star David Ackroyd) family for the first time in 12 years. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.desc: In the finale, Cyril retires and Cedric takes over, but a con artist manipulates him into a risky scheme. Bert and Lisa step in to help, leading to a final showdown about trust and responsibility.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert, Ralph, Melissa, and the gang secretly plan a surprise for Cyril Sneer. When Cyril notices odd behavior, he grows paranoid and believes the Raccoons are plotting against him, leading him to take drastic and ridiculous measures to defend himself.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert sets out to climb Evergreen Mountain alone to prove his independence. Meanwhile, Cyril Sneer plots to stop him to keep a hidden family secret safe. As Bert faces danger and doubt, he must rely on courage and determination to succeed.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert and Ralph take Cedric camping at their childhood fort, but to join their club, Cedric must spend the night in a haunted house alone. As fear sets in, Cedric discovers inner bravery while the others anxiously wait to see if he succeeds.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril and Mammoth Motors plan to build a factory that will harm the forest. To stop him, Bert and his friends create a solar-powered car to race against Cyril’s Sneermobile, with the future of Evergreen Forest depending on the outcome.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated, Cedric runs away and stays with the Raccoons. At the same time, Julie and Tommy run away but become lost in the forest. The gang must find them quickly while helping Cedric deal with his feelings about his father.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert, Cedric, and Broo discover a treasure map and begin searching the forest for hidden riches. When Cyril learns of their quest, he schemes to claim the treasure for himself, turning the search into a race filled with tricks and surprises.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Ralph and Cedric become trapped in Cyril Sneer’s new vault, which is filled with dangerous traps. Bert, Melissa, and Broo attempt a daring rescue, and even Cyril must help as they work together to escape before it is too late.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Ralph receives a job offer in the city, and Ranger Dan is given a similar chance. Bert worries the group will split apart and be unable to stop Cyril’s plans, forcing everyone to decide whether to follow opportunity or stay together.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: After telling too many wild stories, Bert is no longer believed when he discovers Cyril plans to pave the forest into a parking lot. With no one trusting him, Bert must find proof quickly before Cyril carries out his destructive plan.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: When Cedric and Sophia hear that royalty will visit Evergreen Forest, Bert dreams of becoming a knight. Meanwhile, Cyril wants knighthood for power, leading both into humorous efforts to impress the royal visitors during their stay.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril schemes to buy the Evergreen Standard by cutting off its supplies with help from Mr. Knox, who demands payment in gold. Bert tries to save the paper by finding a way to secure resources, leading to a risky plan to outsmart Cyril.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: A pro baseball team visits Evergreen Forest and seeks a new player. Bert and Cedric both compete for the spot, straining their friendship as rivalry grows. In the end, they must decide what matters more, success or their bond.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril offers Bert a deal to become the face of his new cologne line. Tempted by fame and money, Bert considers the offer, but soon realizes the cost of endorsing Cyril’s schemes and must choose between integrity and success.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril panics when his betrayed partner Karl Snarl returns for revenge. Meanwhile, Bert discovers an old helicopter, and Melissa must overcome her fear of heights to help save her friends during a dangerous confrontation.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: After losing power due to unpaid bills, Cyril plans to build a dam to control energy in the forest. Meanwhile, Bert and Cedric stay with Aunt Gertie, whose strict ways test their patience while bigger trouble brews outside.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert and Melissa explore echo caverns and discover strange cave art. Cyril, seeing profit potential, enters the art world and drives up prices. The gang must decide whether art is about value or meaning as greed takes over.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Believing Cyril is dying, Bert spends his savings on a tribute monument. When Cyril learns he is fine, he exploits the situation to sabotage the Evergreen Standard, forcing Bert to recover from his costly mistake quickly.

programme.desc: A misunderstanding leads everyone to believe Cyril is marrying Lady Baden-Baden. Cedric questions his past while Mr. Knox hides his feelings for her. As confusion grows, truths come out and relationships are tested.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: The pigs invent a time machine, which Cyril uses to alter past events for personal gain. However, his meddling causes chaos in the present, forcing the gang to fix the timeline before things spiral completely out of control.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril borrows a priceless diamond for a film, but it disappears. Bert investigates while Cyril tries to hide the loss from Lady Baden-Baden and Mr. Knox, leading to a frantic search filled with misdirection and secrets.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Adventurer Sir Malcolm invites Bert on an expedition, which Cyril secretly funds for treasure. As Bert seeks adventure and discovery, Cyril’s greed threatens the mission, putting everyone in danger along the way.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril’s failing chip business leads him to stage a fake contest to boost sales. Bert gets caught up and wastes money, realizing too late it’s a scam. The gang must expose the truth before others are tricked as well.

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: The pigs’ mother visits, believing her sons are wealthy. To maintain the lie, they scramble to impress her while hiding the truth. Meanwhile, Cyril faces pressure as their deception spirals out of control.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Melissa captures heroic photos of Snag and gains media attention. As fame grows, Snag is offered a TV role, but must decide if he wants the spotlight or a simpler life with his friends in the forest.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert finds a hidden steam train in the forest, while Cyril learns it holds a fortune. Both race to locate it first, leading to a chase where history, greed, and adventure collide deep within Evergreen Forest.

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.desc: Brandon and Lori go for the gold – but find something even better. Jesse takes a swing at Team Brandori, while T- Money does some dangerous bidding of his own. Will Scott and Chrissy drive away with the golden prize?

programme.desc: The Alvarado brothers find an unusual collectible hiding in plain sight -- but are they going to flush their money down the toilet? It’s wheels up for Papa Bear when he takes a gamble on a mysterious covered item.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Does Big Bear mean Big Money? The Alvarados get sneaky while Desert Dan horses around, and frustration gets the best of Brandori. Do they strike gold or strike out? As Jesse crushes dreams, who will go home empty-handed?

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Brandon goes out on a limb, and finds himself sinking in quicksand with no help from Lori – will Desert Dan lend him a hand? Dan’s car smarts come in handy, while T Money rocks out with his win.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Scott blows his wad on an Oktoberfest bin, and will have to drown his sorrows. The Alvarado Brothers bid big on collectibles. Will they draw a wild card? T Money rides away with a big win, while Brandon and Lori investigate a crime scene bin.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Sean holds a one of a kind auction at the Rolls Royce of storage facilities. Jesse draws on his pinball skills to outwit his competitors, while Brandon and Lori take one of the biggest gambles of their career.

programme.desc: A truly enormous auction explodes when rival bidders bet huge sums of money on forfeited international shipping containers.

programme.desc: Manic Matt sets out to prove a point in the port of Oakland, gambling early on a container full of liquor before driving up prices. Will his tactics backfire?

programme.title: Container Wars

programme.desc: The mother lode of all containers makes landfall. Jason and Matt go all in, but will their hunches pay off?
